| | Dear ,
On this upcoming Christmas Day, we celebrate the coming of our Savior from sin and death, predicted over hundred of years by hundreds of prophets so there would be no mistake that God sent his chosen Son, Jesus of Nazareth.

I pray for peace on earth, goodwill towards all men and women, no matter their creed, color, ethnic background or faith. We are all children of God, the creator of the universe and all that is in it. Hallelujah, our savior is born!

Merry Christmas,

Dear Friend,
Christmas is the most joyous time of the year -- filled with hope and optimism, we celebrate the birth of Jesus Christ and surround ourselves with loved ones - exchanging gifts and well wishes.

But it's also a time in which we take a moment to reflect upon the many blessings that we are fortunate to have.

As Marylanders, we are so blessed to live in a state with unlimited potential, a place where you can achieve anything that you put your mind to. [**
**](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86aSEebIwnZHSfw4lz1-2Bd6tcZOe9CoLq3tMbGLZTmy-2F6Y-3DM8Ia_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz67rQQHFYc0ESgM-2Fm-2FMUSD5BLj2i8VWwkovHXit5yQJhicXKTN7WB4kcNRn0bGNv-2FjNI1d80Kb6steljXgnmO8t-2FzpNtpCwv1b1kvgg6vllzZyPZgK9IMYUHqnLr-2BV-2FxZPwuzo4Whe5CQS-2BSDiAvZ4FXLySDlNiHsds-2FbkCyCx7hzML69P9ehX8Ythbmy-2FEhDdD-2BOr-2BA3BeWAzTNInLhTOehSKAGC6d1LrGY4OZYUObZ2HGMquoh68kIAbLQ7aROa9-2FIeH-2BuFziBujNHS-2FMKxJ9klEvmBy0aJ9zgtXniV4sCTeBWBG1UB25bcpIu4WQDJr-2FYYdzXnK4jUF66tLoTAXwl1rEyJN24ZrleDMIqfa57iTZnoq2rAp80MtSNSP8Lv2fRsVDYwhjYUJar824cTtRLmH0r1Q6JSo87kzZNNb-2B30iFu47bzyrGIExw8wjjIjI27BGmVsJQqcxLRPY5PWkkkv0MDiLvHLnPlbFEaS9MWlPMZGp4iK7e2jOJRz0rdGdeOObCpWrdusCScsCdVqu6l-2BxayBTCIdIsTX5LUfCtbp53OipYDF0S-2BU-2FFbi1saXd9786fMLBXC3Pnimf7NKvRHZr20Tm2UUVKwraTSBbCul1ZbO-2FJ3lBRuP7JW-2Bqo9l9z1TC2DDQOE2xt20Upv05DBTbnWyZ-2FESZDrow1Yva46xT9xbmNanawH9yWaM6Oyyz75p5bc-2BavEf8NFC4vkaAflgfY8EePjVVkIKymFS5-2BxGdKR9v0uM1iBDgL4Nd6QqkaMC-2BcRq17-2BSctMu7xkRiKhJxEMilQ1m0RVELy39kz4qz3WXS4oEKGgbepegJ-2Fqv0Zu8Gs0UZblNop0xvh1TsFA-3D-3D)

---
Every Christmas, I'm reminded of working paycheck to paycheck, struggling to make ends meet.

As a young mom of two boys, who tended bar and waited tables, I often worried that I couldn't afford the special toy that the boys wanted under the tree.

It is the spirit of Christmas that brings us all great hope and has guided many of us through our most challenging times.
When I was that struggling mom, I never thought I would be running for governor of Maryland – but my story, like the stories of so many others, serves as an example of what is possible here in this state.

I hope that you find peace, love, and joy this season.

From my family to yours, we wish you a very Merry Christmas!
Sincerely,
---

It is the spirit of Christmas that brings us all great hope and has guided many of us through our most challenging times. When I was that struggling mom, I never thought I would be running for governor of Maryland – but my story, like the stories of so many others, serves as an example of what is possible here in this state. I hope that you find peace, love, and joy this season. From my family to yours, we wish you a very Merry Christmas! Sincerely, | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

clean_body: Tim Ryan is in denial. Peter, Did you see this? If this rant of an email is of any indication, Tim Ryan is not fit to serve in the U.S. Senate. He can say all he wants that I am “pushing conspiracy theories,” but here’s the truth: Tim Ryan is PANICKING. He knows that he is out of step with Ohio voters and is doing everything he can to change the subject. Tim Ryan and his allies in the Democrat Party: Created SKYROCKETING inflation Are working tirelessly to defund the police Want to lock down our country Want to control every aspect of our lives For America’s sake, we MUST defeat Tim Ryan and keep him OUT of the U.S. Senate. That’s why I am calling on ALL patriots to stand with me against Tim Ryan before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. FIGHT BACK NOW: If Tim Ryan wants to be in the Senate so badly, he should move to California and run. His extremist, left-wing, anti-police, socialist views would fit far better there than in the great state of Ohio. I won’t be intimidated by his attacks, Peter, but can I count on you to fight back with me? Thank you, Josh Mandel \------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ From: Izzi Levy <> To: Peter, Subject: Can we talk? Well folks, the pundits are at it again. They’re saying Tim’s got no chance of flipping a Senate seat blue in a state like Ohio. They think far-right Republican Josh Mandel will pull off a win because, well, because they say so. But let’s not forget that Josh has run for Senate twice, and checks notes failed both times. Politics isn’t a game. Whether you live in a steel town or a big city, Ohioans want leaders to fight for jobs that pay the bills, quality health care, and good schools. But instead of showing up for workers, Josh Mandel is pushing conspiracy theories, lying about the results of the 2020 election, and encouraging people to take up arms against their government. Yikes. Look, you and I both know this race will be tough, but it’s winnable—as long as we have the resources to fight off the GOP’s attacks and stop Josh and his toxic brand of politics from gaining any more ground. Thanks a bunch. — Izzi Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc., Justice Opportunity Strength Honor PAC, and Shelby County Republican Party Federal Account. PO Box 24875, Mayfield Heights, OH 44124

name: Joe Arpaio
subject: Fw: Call to service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Arpaio for Fountain Hills, Arizona Mayor
body:
The call to serve has come, and I’m answering that call. Will you stand with me again? |
---
Hey Fellow Conservative,

I just wanted to follow up because I need your help. Liberals in the area just realized that I was running to restore order to the community, so now they’re scared and working every angle to try and defeat me. [**We can’t let them win.**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=3bd510b573294f4ba6062820abc47ad0&_e=5_pN5AIH8cTfHiC8yepn9aqdnh1lt22qsE1h33Rq6Avu2OyZJDv_kwEp60dCGHnTIIMJmIXp0kQOMSwlbnRu-v7d1Mtm2Hovi3rRhkuWjFfSzgrIER_zDrEyqU9NuU2GWyslKFKtQ_Q7blJMPP9yp11e_5wXzD7idum2ekb-g9XywbBZ09WCArhE5mGlbKD4-ZdnooJ8Wy9yGOYeMVLP4gDb0YMR_EjKfwN0iUWyI93PrcnfHQQXmvRlFHxUjzwkEouHzS9LbwR4VmcqZg_QDUbvTGS1qUKTmI7nQnHejtzjGeerSNW6MeP09Y1lQlZ9VIRiBYPEkvxv6XigKu4EywjQZhEzF8fc8_1zFIOd5gC0oZlZ_7dtDsT4W7AW1oKexHHSMdE2uLDbOB2m6d8ag-WxYjM-keHUVWcwWhq_0bk%3D)

**They hate me because I’m a tough on crime, no-nonsense, pro-Trump Republican that wants to get rid of the mismanagement that’s ruined communities around America.**

If you’re able to, [**can you chip in just $25, $50, or anything you can to help me fight back?**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=3bd510b573294f4ba6062820abc47ad0&_e=5_pN5AIH8cTfHiC8yepn9aqdnh1lt22qsE1h33Rq6Avu2OyZJDv_kwEp60dCGHnTIIMJmIXp0kQOMSwlbnRu-v7d1Mtm2Hovi3rRhkuWjFfSzgrIER_zDrEyqU9NuU2GWyslKFKtQ_Q7blJMPP9yp11e_5wXzD7idum2ekb-g9XywbBZ09WCArhE5mGlbKD4-ZdnooJ8Wy9yGOYeMVLP4iPAzs249J4bEIc0lvhMsu0WLt_qu8IkkIsOfYBC3qIGyoXVSd5GM5ERRyGlzTeKpH5THkv6ZbwNV8ayBNPDqPvx5YFeWcT0SVK8VrUZ7AOtKKCv3ZIovhMJ9qH2vpRgpkSRk6It2YCIvOciJbwOXlGV1yqARqv980yT_LGsvftstEyJ-KNkMkcM93MLYtrreon3ZCalqwNjC6MLgx6hYZo%3D)

You know how I feel about the conduct of this past Presidential election, that’s why getting help from patriots like you will help to ensure that doesn’t happen again, especially in this race I’m fighting in. **With your help we can fight for a real win next year, and restore a community in need,** [**are you with me?**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=3bd510b573294f4ba6062820abc47ad0&_e=5_pN5AIH8cTfHiC8yepn9aqdnh1lt22qsE1h33Rq6Avu2OyZJDv_kwEp60dCGHnTIIMJmIXp0kQOMSwlbnRu-v7d1Mtm2Hovi3rRhkuWjFfSzgrIER_zDrEyqU9NuU2GWyslKFKtQ_Q7blJMPP9yp11e_5wXzD7idum2ekb-g9XywbBZ09WCArhE5mGlbKD4-ZdnooJ8Wy9yGOYeMVLP4gnfiauKKKnUKpTMTy7nX2hgZmH0uNIh8lVddDkS303dusvn6ov4-n_VqOPVZRxZWndy72AAgHU5CtC-Qez7ECNnJBD-7Q2MMKIn6di2pDIBZdbs4Z5x7zk2TVgRtt0g2jrRLdXmsVy7YJnS8M6vwkY68BgF33bPtS8IYqLH0KXcJg6z0wTXjukYS1u0HcGE7n4aTTInAYKbVHU1BV2-2Tw%3D)

It's all about the little things when it comes to winning, [**even just $10 can make a difference.**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=3bd510b573294f4ba6062820abc47ad0&_e=5_pN5AIH8cTfHiC8yepn9aqdnh1lt22qsE1h33Rq6Avu2OyZJDv_kwEp60dCGHnTIIMJmIXp0kQOMSwlbnRu-v7d1Mtm2Hovi3rRhkuWjFfSzgrIER_zDrEyqU9NuU2GWyslKFKtQ_Q7blJMPP9yp11e_5wXzD7idum2ekb-g9XywbBZ09WCArhE5mGlbKD4-ZdnooJ8Wy9yGOYeMVLP4qcq1wcULT-UECKltx8p_smbo0PSdTIJEuqreKR8MX72GjssfpRqnZUcR4lIR_K2amRcrfQlW0C7aTjzDQg3bqmJRq16oKRLZVAzZoqRSza3B4UiGMoSBAGZBmMd18l_crfzL_E1-_94rb7v0n6xOcnzA1DeAlAEYdcIWYUpXUoR_dmONxR-dM7RlZEO8thq0TlgaPtGXK8uW2GuIBRqIWs%3D) **But what I need most is to know that I still have your support Fellow Conservative, and that you want Republicans to win at every level of government.** [**Can I count on you?**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=3bd510b573294f4ba6062820abc47ad0&_e=5_pN5AIH8cTfHiC8yepn9aqdnh1lt22qsE1h33Rq6Avu2OyZJDv_kwEp60dCGHnTIIMJmIXp0kQOMSwlbnRu-v7d1Mtm2Hovi3rRhkuWjFfSzgrIER_zDrEyqU9NuU2GWyslKFKtQ_Q7blJMPP9yp11e_5wXzD7idum2ekb-g9XywbBZ09WCArhE5mGlbKD4-ZdnooJ8Wy9yGOYeMVLP4szhvcAWkd-OrZhnCRw4bLXwkxxMGcXYqxnLlT83cS97RQlFFIoTwcBgxBAdyM-9ntoSs99mIfM8KxS12Y6L0X6agFZVu1a_9MjGTF6ZHgAlOYIbAsUOi5ZY5Z89IBir_BQc6rndMmXNGxRTrG5ZOnnVdjp8UFu7G5DhOVQYQgqXgQjTbKru4pisbt5UJbKUX0dAq99TLfY5vLtPDXaUTGc%3D)

Thank you and I hope I have your support.

-Joe Arpaio

Sent from my iPhone

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Joe Arpaio**
Date: Tue, Dec 07, 2021 at 7:02 PM
Subject: Call to service
To: [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=3bd510b573294f4ba6062820abc47ad0&_e=5_pN5AIH8cTfHiC8yepn9aqdnh1lt22qsE1h33Rq6Avu2OyZJDv_kwEp60dCGHnTIIMJmIXp0kQOMSwlbnRu-v7d1Mtm2Hovi3rRhkuWjFfSzgrIER_zDrEyqU9NuU2GWyslKFKtQ_Q7blJMPP9yp11e_5wXzD7idum2ekb-g9XywbBZ09WCArhE5mGlbKD4-ZdnooJ8Wy9yGOYeMVLP4rKI7Qa_UPbB5so4f5-Pq6basP0-EpAs2LQ7BKYBEcsUUenu5hlHMJ1AxtgX-1XabblTs1vEW7c2r1EauZlOoOCLL201HUAScyrdzTeTcLruf3VXVK4k7CjWfhKT1QzQtXF3Wn46t0MBd5glNLxyCekaRoe-JgNA7QgRrXOiKZ-d61BQNgcAelDqTVHnwsxKdx3WWCw4MKpsv2_wG0fxo9s%3D)

[](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=3bd510b573294f4ba6062820abc47ad0&_e=5_pN5AIH8cTfHiC8yepn9aqdnh1lt22qsE1h33Rq6Avu2OyZJDv_kwEp60dCGHnTIIMJmIXp0kQOMSwlbnRu-v7d1Mtm2Hovi3rRhkuWjFfSzgrIER_zDrEyqU9NuU2GWyslKFKtQ_Q7blJMPP9yp11e_5wXzD7idum2ekb-g9XywbBZ09WCArhE5mGlbKD4-ZdnooJ8Wy9yGOYeMVLP4jRqJEkv0J9uE6HjU6t05qdeKI4qeYI7hHGfgkM4-l_LmWhl9vThRQxu38dCtQ0rV2Uy8kj-nAyAVjc26yO0xjONwJBxlb-AYd38o2aD6cprg1eBtJP35YQ8H-RmM20rCLjNJnbPl5H7d-6ZTCr5cEuxsHD47U9J9iMHuAOEF6eP1xgSo5smj8AxOdKKnEKzZ-UNbuDa7EQXQXdVj4Ep5Eg%3D)
Hey Fellow Conservative,

You know me as “America’s Toughest Sheriff,” a strong supporter of President Trump, and an unapologetic, tough-on-crime conservative. **You’ve stood by my side through thick and thin and I couldn’t be more grateful.**

Since the beginning of my career, I’ve always believed that local government is better at solving our problems instead of bloated bureaucracies forced on us by the federal or state government.

That’s why it’s so important to get involved and to serve wherever you can, especially now with so many of our cities being taken over by anti-police radicals and woke politicians looking to impose their brand of politics on our children and grandchildren.

**Because of this, I’m answering the call of duty to serve my community of Fountain Hills and running to be the next Mayor.** Right now, we’re suffering from a horrible lack of leadership, and if you’re anything like me, I’m sure you can understand how frustrating it is when you have elected officials who don’t serve the people. It’s wrong and I won’t stand for it, and [**that’s why I need your help.**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=3bd510b573294f4ba6062820abc47ad0&_e=5_pN5AIH8cTfHiC8yepn9aqdnh1lt22qsE1h33Rq6Avu2OyZJDv_kwEp60dCGHnTIIMJmIXp0kQOMSwlbnRu-v7d1Mtm2Hovi3rRhkuWjFfSzgrIER_zDrEyqU9NuU2GWyslKFKtQ_Q7blJMPP9yp11e_5wXzD7idum2ekb-g9XywbBZ09WCArhE5mGlbKD4-ZdnooJ8Wy9yGOYeMVLP4pCRfZigimEEzaPNXQSB28xTtYl08flkjNqZ-XG9ANg4d4XP47mbxSzulG4mSeR9fWzMx6FTFmSmt90bpPmXADf6n3cN9f3A7CscUbxKUizv_m3cNp3XIe2WFgAIY2vt6pX7DVDB6O9YXQ9YObohwUNmrko4ZQPhHT6OrEl0Lwp_fil4YzdD0Kxuq_B6IRmBfIeyWvan5y-mcPtHQ8TeLY4%3D)

[** HELP JOE ARPAIO FIGHT FOR BETTER LOCAL GOVERNMENT **](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=3bd510b573294f4ba6062820abc47ad0&_e=5_pN5AIH8cTfHiC8yepn9aqdnh1lt22qsE1h33Rq6Avu2OyZJDv_kwEp60dCGHnTIIMJmIXp0kQOMSwlbnRu-v7d1Mtm2Hovi3rRhkuWjFfSzgrIER_zDrEyqU9NuU2GWyslKFKtQ_Q7blJMPP9yp11e_5wXzD7idum2ekb-g9XywbBZ09WCArhE5mGlbKD4-ZdnooJ8Wy9yGOYeMVLP4kvoNQG7TyE4U-3hZ1hYBBv3U0vzAoczIeKbhqsnVmEOxR7h7Zp1z18rQ1jlgUs1SgyzBgFy4Xhb66-rlF4W4pYJHoR2JXdLpf9T7CToSvVkr11X2-qPH3E7pvXCp5HTHFXUM9WxWYQ8buLZeXzWwqcqgantNtr9irso3L-NA6_bLcntKP2tTffBotwH1BaWN4vdyI0CSyF2b8SXAw9DywY%3D)
I know you’ve supported me in the past when I was the Sheriff of Maricopa County, and when I was running for higher office. [**That's why I’m asking for your support again.**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=3bd510b573294f4ba6062820abc47ad0&_e=5_pN5AIH8cTfHiC8yepn9aqdnh1lt22qsE1h33Rq6Avu2OyZJDv_kwEp60dCGHnTIIMJmIXp0kQOMSwlbnRu-v7d1Mtm2Hovi3rRhkuWjFfSzgrIER_zDrEyqU9NuU2GWyslKFKtQ_Q7blJMPP9yp11e_5wXzD7idum2ekb-g9XywbBZ09WCArhE5mGlbKD4-ZdnooJ8Wy9yGOYeMVLP4iCJukz5PFs_iSLMZlAA6nzNfx2RTdMx-YRzq6XZ68OEewXaqP9VfEKIwLnlabTABe7x2iij-TNkc_2YmOHqLIYYd7P3cjmtajiP4VF5doRT8XqrNFWYVkjDoa3rl1YvgV-16iLFWfBI1p_sWtsfauOIOc19KOgqlRHsrfwR8fptZvqKIE1vbCiWqLcnWaWDpOIGKjhX5lXwWpFYaasKJiM%3D)

**We have to fight for our neighbors, for our values, and we have to make sure our foundations at the local level are solid. If we don’t do that then we turn into places likes San Francisco, Chicago, and New York.**

Stand with me today so I can fight for the type of community we all want. [**Pitch in today and help me bring real leadership to a community in need.**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=3bd510b573294f4ba6062820abc47ad0&_e=5_pN5AIH8cTfHiC8yepn9aqdnh1lt22qsE1h33Rq6Avu2OyZJDv_kwEp60dCGHnTIIMJmIXp0kQOMSwlbnRu-v7d1Mtm2Hovi3rRhkuWjFfSzgrIER_zDrEyqU9NuU2GWyslKFKtQ_Q7blJMPP9yp11e_5wXzD7idum2ekb-g9XywbBZ09WCArhE5mGlbKD4-ZdnooJ8Wy9yGOYeMVLP4h-XCu18Zb1S1eopBB-83MBjVmfsNss2N0TO3b4Kt_7soBPdHXaAtm5HxmYECnyhgH0oiWIvloLY-3kzl3zgYFEc7yXfAbHbe4Z4OeI__QS0mC99K1OUHCUprIbRPpbF1QDQ1-OkdyB9hyNXJG64erpzwJXNCwUaBKP6GH8tfIePps6Xg-sU102oBj8ffKHZgHrP9ZIH5AG1HC-eC97UD9w%3D)

Thank you,

clean_body: The call to serve has come, and I’m answering that call. Will you stand with me again? | Hey Fellow Conservative, I just wanted to follow up because I need your help. Liberals in the area just realized that I was running to restore order to the community, so now they’re scared and working every angle to try and defeat me. They hate me because I’m a tough on crime, no-nonsense, pro-Trump Republican that wants to get rid of the mismanagement that’s ruined communities around America. If you’re able to, You know how I feel about the conduct of this past Presidential election, that’s why getting help from patriots like you will help to ensure that doesn’t happen again, especially in this race I’m fighting in. With your help we can fight for a real win next year, and restore a community in need, It's all about the little things when it comes to winning, But what I need most is to know that I still have your support Fellow Conservative, and that you want Republicans to win at every level of government. Thank you and I hope I have your support. -Joe Arpaio Sent from my iPhone \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Joe Arpaio Date: Tue, Dec 07, 2021 at 7:02 PM Subject: Call to service To: Hey Fellow Conservative, You know me as “America’s Toughest Sheriff,” a strong supporter of President Trump, and an unapologetic, tough-on-crime conservative. You’ve stood by my side through thick and thin and I couldn’t be more grateful. Since the beginning of my career, I’ve always believed that local government is better at solving our problems instead of bloated bureaucracies forced on us by the federal or state government. That’s why it’s so important to get involved and to serve wherever you can, especially now with so many of our cities being taken over by anti-police radicals and woke politicians looking to impose their brand of politics on our children and grandchildren. Because of this, I’m answering the call of duty to serve my community of Fountain Hills and running to be the next Mayor. Right now, we’re suffering from a horrible lack of leadership, and if you’re anything like me, I’m sure you can understand how frustrating it is when you have elected officials who don’t serve the people. It’s wrong and I won’t stand for it, and I know you’ve supported me in the past when I was the Sheriff of Maricopa County, and when I was running for higher office. We have to fight for our neighbors, for our values, and we have to make sure our foundations at the local level are solid. If we don’t do that then we turn into places likes San Francisco, Chicago, and New York. Stand with me today so I can fight for the type of community we all want. Thank you, Joe Arpaio Candidate for Mayor of Fountain Hills Experience. Principles. Leadership. | | Paid for by Joe Arpaio for Fountain Hills, Arizona Mayor. Authorized by Joe Arpaio.

body:

A new WSJ poll found voters are ready for a change - are you?

Those polled are feeling the harsh effects of Joe Biden’s economy and believe that it will continue to get worse.

29% think inflation will get worse.

46% think the economy will get worse.

33% think crime will be worse.

26% think border security will get worse.

Not only have Americans soured on Democrats - they see Republicans as the solution.

subject: Look, we asked you to sign this, but we don’t have a record for you??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
it didn’t have to come to this...
| Joe Manchin is blocking democracy by supporting the filibuster.

_Let’s be frank: The filibuster is still blocking every single piece of meaningful legislation._

**That’s why we launched a BRAND new letter to Senator Manchin, but YOU haven’t signed it!** [But friend, it’s not too late. Chip in $2 to sign our card to Joe Manchin and tell him to eliminate the filibuster! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4613?t=6&akid=1043%2E878179%2EyLPZc_) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4613?t=7&akid=1043%2E878179%2EyLPZc_) | [CHIP IN $2 TO ADD MY NAME](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4613?t=8&akid=1043%2E878179%2EyLPZc_)
---
TO: SENATOR JOE MANCHIN
ADDRESS: HART BUILDING, WASHINGTON D.C.
DATE: DECEMBER 23, 2021

**_Dear Senator Manchin,_**

We need to have a serious talk.

While I admire your desire for bipartisanship, _right now, in statehouses across the country, Republicans are trying to dismantle voting rights._

The voters of our country gave Democrats a mandate, Senator, and you have an obligation to support this sacred right.

**I’m personally DEMANDING you step up, meet this moment, and ABOLISH the filibuster.**

[That’s why I’m giving a donation of $2 to the Voter Protection Project, an organization founded to protect the right to vote, right now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4613?t=9&akid=1043%2E878179%2EyLPZc_) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4613?t=10&akid=1043%2E878179%2EyLPZc_)
---
History won’t look kindly on those who didn’t act on this issue.

And while I know you want bipartisanship -- _SO DO I!_ \-- Republicans have made it clear that they don’t care about what’s best for our country.

So I really need you to act.

**We can’t wait for Republicans to _maybe_ do the right thing -- state legislatures are already trying to destroy the right to vote!**

[ So please, STAND UP, defend voting rights and abolish the filibuster. I know I am, and I’ll show it with a $2 donation to VPP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4613?t=11&akid=1043%2E878179%2EyLPZc_)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4613?t=12&akid=1043%2E878179%2EyLPZc_)
---
Thank you,

**_xx A Concerned American_**
[SIGNATURE PENDING $2 DONATION, GIVE NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4613?t=13&akid=1043%2E878179%2EyLPZc_)
[DONATE!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4613?t=14&akid=1043%2E878179%2EyLPZc_)

Folks,

**It’s the End of the Month, End of the Year, and the End of the times!**

**Well, maybe not the end of the times, but sometimes the Democrats make it sound like it is when they break a shoelace and blame it on climate change.**

I won’t take up too much of your time because you are hard at work providing for you and yours. _Unlike Joe Biden who spends his afternoons following a strict nap schedule._

**[If you are able to contribute just $5 or $10 dollars to support me as I gear up for my re-election campaign, I’d be as happy as a hog in mud!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqum6aepaqgvbs6u63d7qevu6vgk1rosdi99v078_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cpgm9o34cph2bs)**

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
I’m writing to wish you & your family all the best.
| | |
---
Merry Christmas, Peter!

This is such a special time of year, when we have the opportunity to slow down for a bit, reflect on our many blessings, and spend quality time with those we love the most.

From the Hern family to yours, I want to wish you wonderful Christmas and a safe, prosperous, and happy New Year!
---
---
As I reflect on the challenging year we’ve had, I want to once again thank you for your encouragement, help, and support. I truly appreciate it more than words can express.

And together, we’re going to fight and win in the year ahead to TAKE BACK our country.

Enjoy a wonderful Christmas today!

\- Kevin
---

name: David Palmer
subject: Wishing you warm holiday wishes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palmer for Illinois
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39987707/322334035/312490568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjM5NzNjOS1jMTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EEnhQ1g-augniS_FlOTq35U6lbWQZxk__eq3TaVw4aA=) | Peter, This holiday season, I have found myself spending more time reflecting. Running for office has been a hectic and sometimes stressful adventure. **But, as I gather with those I love in celebration of the season, I could not be more grateful to be where I am in this moment.** **** While I never saw myself jumping into the political world, I have always been drawn to service. As a mentor, advisor, and now candidate, I see every day just how incredible the strength of community truly is. From my local coffee shop, to the Don Moyer Boys & Girls Club where I spend so many of my afternoons I see that when we come together to build stronger communities, we all thrive. **And, to me, that is the spirit of the season.** **So, as we celebrate the bounty around us, Chelsea and I want to extend our warm wishes to you and yours. No matter how you celebrate, I want to say thank you. Thank you for being a partner in this journey.** David Palmer
---

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Merry Christmas Eve
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
While we take time today to cherish family and loved ones, I wanted to take a moment to extend my thoughts and warm wishes to you. Peter,

While we take time today to cherish family and loved ones, I wanted to take a moment to extend my thoughts and warm wishes to you.

This Christmas will be a difficult one for many Kentuckians with so many communities hit hard by devastating tornadoes. I want every single Kentuckian impacted by these storms to know we are there for them and will be in the days and years to come as we rebuild together.

And as COVID-19 continues to surge through our communities, it's more important than ever that we do everything we can to protect ourselves and our neighbors, slow the spread, and stay safe.

I am grateful to each of you for being on this team and for the brave and generous folks who are supporting our Western Kentucky neighbors as we recover and rebuild. If I've learned anything from my time in Frankfort working with Kentuckians across our commonwealth, it's that we will get through this. We will get through this together.

Merry Christmas,

Andy

| PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR

body:
We hope that you and your loved ones are safe, well, and together. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39987692/322334019/823540626?refcode=ea.543973c9-c164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.543973c9-c164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDM5NzNjOS1jMTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F82Ka_NwYlRlZBtG83-TmJPfYmEoNzztUuWpDYp40r8=&emci=972ad2ea-9462-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=543973c9-c164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)
Hello Peter, **Kristin and I wish you a Merry Christmas, Happy New Year and a joyful holiday season.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39987693/322334020/823540626?refcode=ea.543973c9-c164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.543973c9-c164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDM5NzNjOS1jMTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F82Ka_NwYlRlZBtG83-TmJPfYmEoNzztUuWpDYp40r8=&emci=972ad2ea-9462-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=543973c9-c164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176) As we look forward to 2022, we remain grateful for the hard work and sacrifice of healthcare workers, first responders, frontline service people, volunteers, people of faith, scientists and researchers who created the vaccines that are our light in the dark, for educators who have gone above and beyond to make sure our children keep learning through difficult circumstances, and for neighbors who help neighbors when times are hardest. These are the things our family will reflect on this holiday season and for years to come as we remember 2020 and 2021. **We hope that you and your loved ones are safe, well, and together.** May God bless you and your family and you have all of our best wishes, Roy and Kristin Cooper
* * *

name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6694%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=8UXbwfi0xHxhc4uNfiqhAg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68185%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FVur9iIfFSzieyuybivmQw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68186%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N11SXs3763q8T9ERUL1h2w&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68187%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AKmUYmAW%2bkgdyGkHdVujXg&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

We’re putting in the hard work every single day, talking to voters all across this district in order to ensure that Marjorie Taylor Greene is a one-term Congresswoman. [**The radical-right is pulling out all the stops to defeat our campaign, but we’re NOT going to back down. Will you help me out by chipping in to my campaign for Congress today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39987752/322334135/-825069922?refcode=20211224_TF_helpFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjM5NzNjOS1jMTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xmSJIdmnRr-lBkdkFXJ5nWUupcXQkc2p7YKVXt6TZvg=) | **[DONATE NOW>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39987753/322334136/-825069922?refcode=20211224_TF_helpFWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjM5NzNjOS1jMTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xmSJIdmnRr-lBkdkFXJ5nWUupcXQkc2p7YKVXt6TZvg=)**

Our district, our state, and our country can’t afford two more years of Marjorie Taylor Greene in Congress.
Let's get to work,

body:
This race is about more than just Florida – it's about the very future of our Democracy

Friend,

In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign before midnight. But first, please give me a chance to explain why this request matters so much right now.

**This race is about more than just Florida – it's about the very future of our democracy.**

Eleven months ago, I stood in front of the Senate and made the case for why Donald Trump should be impeached.

My opponent, Marco Rubio, sat there and listened to the details about how Trump led his supporters in an attempted insurrection – and then called it all a "waste of time" and voted to exonerate Trump.

But this election is not just about me versus Marco Rubio. **With political experts saying that this race will determine control of the Senate, this election will decide whether or not Trump, Rubio and McConnell can regain power in 2022.**
That's why I'm reaching out today, friend. I'm just 2 points behind in a race that could unseat Rubio and defend our Democratic Senate majority, but Trump and McConnell are rallying to help Rubio raise millions. The only way we'll win is with massive grassroots support, so I need your help.
**I need all hands on deck to hit my $80,000 goal by midnight, but I'm falling short. I set an ambitious and necessary goal, and I'm counting on concerned Democrats like you to give now if you want to defeat Marco Rubio and keep the GOP out of power:**

Just wanted to touch base one last time before Christmas because we really need to know: As governor, Ron DeSantis has worked furiously to suppress the vote, voiced his support for overturning Roe v. Wade , and virtually ignored the threats of COVID-19 and climate change. He’s chased big money donors from out of state and put their partisan interests ahead of everyday Floridians. Now he’s officially filed to run for re-election, and next to Donald Trump he’s the most likely Republican nominee for president in 2024. If he wins next year you can bet the auditioning for the White House will only get worse – and that’s something that none of us can afford. Thanks, and Merry Christmas! Team Charlie Crist = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

name: Deb and Jerry Finkenauer
subject: Our little girl [photo attached]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39989438/322339213/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk458-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTc0NmQ5Mi1jNDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mzWjSq4cI12aOgzGp1H2_n9ve-MxBJ6UtILTdHPQWyg=)
Hi Peter,

That's our little girl, Abby, you're looking at.

Back then, if you had told us our little girl would grow up to be elected to Congress and go on to challenge Sen. Chuck Grassley (who, by the way, was our senator even all those years ago!), well – we _absolutely_ would have believed you.
You see, Abby's always stuck up for what she believes in and fought for what's right. Since the age of 10, she has sat at the kitchen table with her grandfather and uncles – some of them Democrats, some of them Republicans – and talked politics. We may not have been able to give our daughter a trust fund or write a six-figure check for college, but what we did give her was her work ethic.

So as Abby grew up and saw work to be done, she signed up and _did_ the work. She won election to the Iowa House of Representatives at only 25 years old – and then four years later became the youngest woman to flip a U.S. House seat from Republican to Democratic. All along the way, she's been fighting for working families like ours.
We have complete faith that Abby will work her heart out and defeat Sen. Grassley. But we've seen how things work in Iowa. Last time around, our Senate election was one of the most expensive in the country. The Republican establishment will pour millions into our state to attack competitive challengers like our daughter – and right now, they have nearly $30 million in the bank to protect Sen. Grassley, who's facing record-low approval with Iowans.
**This is where you come in, Peter: Abby will win if she has _ _ an unprecedented grassroots movement backing her. [So will you help our daughter raise another $15,000 before the most important FEC deadline of the year? Donate $5 or whatever you can right now, and every dollar will ensure Abby's campaign has what it takes to defeat top Trump ally Sen. Grassley and protect Democratic Senate control.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39989439/322339214/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk458-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTc0NmQ5Mi1jNDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mzWjSq4cI12aOgzGp1H2_n9ve-MxBJ6UtILTdHPQWyg=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39989440/322339215/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk458-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTc0NmQ5Mi1jNDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mzWjSq4cI12aOgzGp1H2_n9ve-MxBJ6UtILTdHPQWyg=)

name: American Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8238%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=oyTbkQuoXXc0JsUHTJBCBA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10335%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6g95tvgq96A832z%2f8I1h8w&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10336%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kLxy8L9PN49SD8D0AEB2Lg&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10337%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iwJf5QgCaBlJewMBkub%2b5w&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Hello,
If your house is anything like ours right now, the Holiday Season is in full swing. It is truly the greatest time of the year.
But it is also a time for great reflection, and I want to know what’s going on in your life. What are the important issues right now to grassroots Democrats like you and your family?

body:
Friend –
Since our campaign launched in July, we’ve experienced an outpouring of enthusiasm & support from folks across the state and country.
With your help, in just 5 months we have out-raised any other Democratic candidate in the 1st Congressional district for the whole election cycle in 28 years and received more individual donations this year than the current Congressman!
As we head into the holiday weekend, we wanted to share some highlights and accomplishments – made possible by supporters like you.
CONVERSATIONS ACROSS THE COUNTRYSIDE

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Seeking your feedback: Is the Supreme Court too politicized?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend,

The Supreme Court has become deeply politicized – one need not look any further than the Court's behavior for the last few months to see that. Rather than respect the precedent of Roe v. Wade and the civil rights protected under the 14th Amendment, the conservative justices of the court allowed Texas' extreme abortion ban to stand while it awaits legal challenge. They ruled this not once, but twice.

Just recently, a bipartisan panel of legal scholars submitted a report to President Biden that considers changes to make the Supreme Court less politicized. Among such considerations are the imposition of term limits for justices, which the report describes as having public support.

Reform of our deeply politicized Supreme Court must begin, which is why I'm working on legislation to reform the Court.

Staggered term limits would help prevent an overtly political orchestration to the degree that Mitch McConnell carried out. Remember, he blocked the consideration of President Obama's nominee, Merrick Garland, citing appointments shouldn't be made in election years – but then turned around and rammed through the nomination of Amy Coney Barrett during an election year.

It's actions such as these that have led the Supreme Court to be, at best, ideologically imbalanced and, at worst, hotly political. But in order to realize reform for our nation's highest court, it will be up to grassroots Democrats like you to speak up loudly. That's why I'm putting out an urgent poll to this team and need to hear from 2,956 of you before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Tell me:

Is the Supreme Court in need of reform?

Yes
https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-WHPA-SCOTUS?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1115-su-nd

No
https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-WHPA-SCOTUS?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1115-su-nd

Thank you for speaking up.

Dick

--

name: John & Dena Cranley
subject: Merry Christmas and Happy New Year, from our family to yours.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
John Cranley for Governor

Hi there,

We want to wish you a very Merry Christmas and all the best for the New Year.

We’re so grateful for our family, friends, neighbors, and supporters this and every holiday season, and we hope that you are also able to spend time with the people you care about.

As we look forward to 2022, we hope above all for an end to this pandemic — and we are grateful to the frontline workers, health care professionals, and others who have given their all to keep us safe over the last two years.

However you spend these holidays, we hope you are extending kindness, grace, and generosity to those around you — and that you and your loved ones are safe and well.

All our best,

John & Dena

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.

Please make a donation today, and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-email?refcode=em_jc_fr_footer_link

clean_body: John Cranley for Governor Hi there, We want to wish you a very Merry Christmas and all the best for the New Year. We’re so grateful for our family, friends, neighbors, and supporters this and every holiday season, and we hope that you are also able to spend time with the people you care about. As we look forward to 2022, we hope above all for an end to this pandemic — and we are grateful to the frontline workers, health care professionals, and others who have given their all to keep us safe over the last two years. However you spend these holidays, we hope you are extending kindness, grace, and generosity to those around you — and that you and your loved ones are safe and well. All our best, John & Dena John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. Please make a donation today, and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>> [ Instagram [] Facebook [] Twitter [] Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States

Because of your generous donations and involvement with our PAC, we have been able to accomplish an unbelievable amount of things this year.

Barrier To Entry PAC & Pay Your Interns PAC has collectively raised $45,000 since launching in March of 2021. Because we are a small organization and our overhead is so small, we are able to give back almost every dollar of what you all have donated.

The money we raised has helped and will continue to help dismantle the socioeconomic barriers that low-income working-class candidates face during their campaigns. By providing them with funds, we are taking away the stress of covering campaign costs and letting them focus on their political mission of change.

And this time of the year is the hardest for our candidates – while we have the leisure of taking off work and enjoying time with family and friends, candidates continue to work 12 hour days. We are hoping to make this month special for them by providing them with funds and giving them momentum moving into 2022. **[We know it’s a lot to ask, but would you chip in today and spread the joy by making a donation for working-class candidates running for office?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39994629/322363639/-2038882143?refcode=211224_FR_tistheseason

name: Stewart Navarre
subject: Happiest of Holidays
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://stewartnavarre.com/ [https://stewartnavarre.com/]Hey Team,
I wanted to reach out and wish you a very happy holiday. This year feels very different than last year, when we were still unable to fully enjoy each other’s company for fear of spreading COVID-19. Now, thanks to the hard work of health care workers and the phenoms of science, we are able to celebrate together once more.
I will be spending the holidays with my loved ones and I hope you’re able to do the same. So from my family to yours: stay warm, stay safe, and have a very happy holiday.
All the best to you and your family,
Stewart Navarre
PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
Stewart Navarre for Congress
PO Box 150
Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States

subject: Happy Holidays from Team Never Again PAC!

body:
Last year, the Proud Boys and made-up militias were already planning one of the worst attacks against our democracy in a generation. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39995124/322367707/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhOTdkMTg5LWQyNjQtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q3SNiKymD4mhvLarqvrDavvFhnf0NAclJNWYDUHKhQk=&emci=5716fe1c-1d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4a97d189-d264-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=16335001) **Happy holidays from Team Never Again PAC, team!**

Last year, the Proud Boys and made-up militias were already planning one of the worst attacks against our democracy in a generation.

All hell broke loose on January 6th and the 21st century United States saw its first coup with the aid of some of today's most notorious elected officials. We saw this and decided to take matters into our own hands.

**"Never Again" is a call to action in the face of facisim, in the face of injustice, and a promise that we can do better.**

Our most sincere wishes this holiday season are for dangerous and radical elected officials to be held accountable and for our democracy to live on. Thank you for supporting our mission throughout this year with your generous donations and unwavering support.**In this season of giving, you've given us a lot.**

In the spirit of the season we wanted to wish you a joyful and safe holiday! Thank you for being a part of our team and we hope we'll see more of you come 2022.

Thanks,

Team Never Again PAC

P.S. As you sit around the dinner table, remember to make our nation safer by reporting any relatives who admit to participating in the January 6th riots!
Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Louie Gohmert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/neveragain-dec21?refcode=em21_211224_HC_fnd_gq_test___NAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211224_HC_fnd_gq_test___NAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326)

Merry Christmas! May your hearts be filled with joy, peace, and gratitude this holiday season. May your spirits be full of love as we give thanks for our health, life, faith, family, friendship, and community. May we also remember to uplift those who have suffered a loss this year - especially during this holiday season. Peace, joy, and God's blessings to all of you and your families!
Wishing you a happy & healthy holiday season!
---

Sincerely,
Amanda K Edwards

subject: Happy holidays, friend!
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39995540/322370547/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzM1NjNlZi1kMzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eWS31asXBEkJD2jxQ1XIKThHC7uUtnaZQhBPbNZDpg8=)
Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays, friend!

I hope you're getting a chance to spend time and relax with family and friends this holiday season. The past few years have been difficult for many of us, especially with the pandemic. I cherish moments we have with family, friends, and each other.

That certainly extends to you, friend! I'm so grateful for everything you've done to support our campaign so far. It's taken a lot to get to this point, and I know we couldn't have done it without you. Working together on this campaign and working for a brighter future for all of us has been rewarding and satisfying.

I'm looking forward to what we can achieve together next year, and I hope you have a moment to rest before things start to really pick up on the campaign trail.

With gratitude,

Donna

subject: Happy Holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:

Hello, This time of year, I find myself thinking about how we let light in. Looking for the bright spots is something that we can all share and do more of, no matter our background, what holiday we celebrate or who we gather with, and it’s something I hope you make space for this season. Wishing you every good wish for joy, good health, and warmth, Maggie, Tom, Meg, Ben, and Chip

So even though The Cook Political Report increased my chances of winning, I have a steep mountain to climb to catch up to the GOP's advantage in Florida.

name: Charlie Gearing
subject: Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Peter -

Rachael and I just wanted to send you a quick note to wish you and your family a Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!

As we take this time at the end of the year to reflect and spend time with our families, we are so grateful for the love and support we have received from friends and supporters like you this past year. We’re building something special here in District 114 – a coalition of grassroots supporters who believe in a better future for our families, children, schools, neighborhoods, and communities.

We’re excited about the year ahead, and we’re so grateful to have you on this journey with us. Thank you for your confidence in me and the campaign we are building. Together we’re going to build a better Texas for all of our neighbors.

Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays,

- Charlie

Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.
Donate Now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gearingdigital]Learn more at gearingfortexas.com [https://www.gearingfortexas.com/?]

Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Before Christmas Eve . . .
body:
I hope you're all set for Christmas and that any last-minute shopping or plans are completed with ease.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/clBXgwsfKlMs3dnuVI892S4g/MGZGNnFHuFgSh5G6VqhRmA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/clBXgwsfKlMs3dnuVI892S4g/MGZGNnFHuFgSh5G6VqhRmA) I hope you're all set for Christmas and that any last-minute shopping or plans are completed with ease.

Before you turn to the Christmas break with your family, I wanted to make one special request from you . . .

. . . will you allow me to work for you and your family in Washington?

I hope by now that you can see the passion and fight that I have in me to do so much for our nation.

I hope you can see that I'm not "one of them" and will NEVER fall in line with the establishment politicians who have done so much to harm our nation.

I will NEVER sell out, and I will not compromise my core values for the middle ground of mediocrity.

I won't trade influence to line my campaign coffers or personal accounts like so many others.

**But I will serve you and your family to the best of my abilities.**

**And I will vote to put AMERICA FIRST in all that I do as a member of Congress.**

All that I ask is that you help me get there . . . please, with my greatest sincerity, [**will you donate before Christmas Eve?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/clBXgwsfKlMs3dnuVI892S4g/MGZGNnFHuFgSh5G6VqhRmA)

I sincerely appreciate your generosity and attention, and I hope you enjoy a VERY Merry Christmas with those whom you love.

With respect and gratitude,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/MGZGNnFHuFgSh5G6VqhRmA)

name: Linda Ensor
subject: Merry Christmas! and Ingrid's plans for Sunday
body:
Hi Volunteers --

Rev up your engines and let's have fun this Sunday!

Here’s our game plan at New Realm Brewing, 880 Island Park Drive, Daniel Island.

Meet Ingrid at 11:30 at her white '73 Corvette Stingray. The eight-foot vinyl roll-up sign will be easy to find, too. You'll get your campaign cap, palm cards and clipboard. Please ask people for their name, phone, email and postal addresses. And make sure they are legible!!

Also, Ingrid asks that you install the Signal texting app:
https://signal.org/en/download <https://signal.org/en/download>/
and subscribe to her YouTube channel at https://youtube.com/channel/UCu6JxpOKRZy5pJn0AWT9e_g <https://youtube.com/channel/UCu6JxpOKRZy5pJn0AWT9e_g>.

If you have any questions, you may ask me (I’m the person who sent you this text).

Merry Christmas and Happy New Year, Ingrid and Linda

name: ICYMI News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6hg9912l6puk9rf68nnlkh2mj4qe0jg1dmpri78_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cphmaoj1chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbnmgil927jtbj3fqul3s1e42erqncu2h9t0m45o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cphmaoj1chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5vdla0g23dthga6ad2dk68rjspsooegutk4fq40_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cphmaoj1chh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

subject: 30 seconds

name: Casey Wardynski
subject: Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CASEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
I just wanted to take a moment to wish you the best this Christmas.
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/b8961945c0e38176/e170bc3549dee0f7c3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Peter, I hope you and your family are having a great Christmas. I know my family and I are excited to take a brief break from the campaign trail. And we’re enjoying our time together celebrating the birth of Christ. But I still wanted to take a moment to wish you a Merry Christmas. While we celebrate this joyous holiday, my family and I always reflect on the blessings we’ve received this year. And we can’t thank you enough for being part of our campaign team.
---
---
I spent many Christmases away from home, deployed. So, in the spirit of this holiday, I hope you’ll join us in offering up a prayer for the brave men and women who are serving our country overseas and unable to spend this special day with their loved ones. I wish you and your family a very Merry Christmas! Casey Wardynski
---
id:2021-12-14-21:20:05:869t

name: Tom Nelson
subject: Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | **Check out:[_Tom's Christmas Wishes on Facebook_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39997713/322383817/-1361044586?refcode=TN_EM_EN_1MO_211224_1_1&refcode2=742e6538-e164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDJlNjUzOC1lMTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x9DcrePL_lDZ1m55OPJcGtTYU6xhsPDkIQwEzj6OSqs=&emci=a037e38f-b661-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=742e6538-e164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15112925)**
* * *

This really is my favorite time of the year.

Charlie Brown Christmas soundtrack on an endless YouTube loop on my computer as I click away on work, punch out tweets and draft email blasts.

Dribbling out presents to Mary and George one at a time in the days leading up to Christmas to keep them settled down, and mom and dad sane.

Listening for snow plows to rumble past our house in the middle of the night, signaling the season’s first snow fall.

It’s also a time that I reflect on Christmases long ago.

I am a pastor’s kid. Christmas Eve service — like all others throughout the year — was mandatory. And I say mandatory because it felt like a mandate. It was hard to sit through, more so for a prepubescent with undiagnosed ADD.

I’d always foul things up, pushing my sister off her chair, talking during the sermon or letting candle wax drip onto my slacks. That was the excuse my mom needed to ground me in the car when we got home. The 10 minute penance was just enough for Santa to get the presents under the tree.

There is also the time of taking plates of cookies with my dad to the Combined Locks police and fire departments. It’s a tradition I carry on to this day when I bring treats to county corrections officers and 911 dispatchers on Christmas and other holidays.

But my favorite memories are Christmases on the farm. There wasn’t anything particularly notable about it; just a gathering of aunts and uncles and cousins at the family homestead. For me it just felt special. I adored my grandma and grandpa; I revered my older cousins. Pulling into the driveway, it felt like we were driving in a snow globe.

My dad has long-since retired. Mom passed away, as have my grandma and grandpa.

When I ponder those memories I hear the narrator from the film, Radio Days:

“With the passing of each new year, those voices do seem to grow dimmer and dimmer.”

Take this time to relive your own memories of Christmas past; cherish every moment you have with your loved ones; and if you travel, be sure to give yourself extra room behind the county snow plow truck.

May these days be always merry and bright.

— Tom Nelson

---

Kirsten

name: Gwen Moore (personal)
subject: 🎄🎁🤶🏽 Wishing you and yours a wonderful holiday
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Happy Holidays Peter , From my family here in Milwaukee to yours, we hope you have a wonderful holiday this year. As we return to a more normal holiday season, gathering together in person, and many of us seeing family and loved ones for the first time in over a year, let us remember to be safe and take all necessary precautions as the spread of the Omicron variant is ripping through our nation. You truly are the wind beneath my wings, and I am so blessed to have your continued support. We have much work ahead of us, but for now, let’s pause and enjoy one another as we close out a historic year for our beloved America. Again, please stay safe and healthy.

With peace, love, and much joy,
Gwen Moore Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District
Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act

clean_body: Happy Holidays Peter , From my family here in Milwaukee to yours, we hope you have a wonderful holiday this year. As we return to a more normal holiday season, gathering together in person, and many of us seeing family and loved ones for the first time in over a year, let us remember to be safe and take all necessary precautions as the spread of the Omicron variant is ripping through our nation. You truly are the wind beneath my wings, and I am so blessed to have your continued support. We have much work ahead of us, but for now, let’s pause and enjoy one another as we close out a historic year for our beloved America. Again, please stay safe and healthy. With peace, love, and much joy, Gwen Moore Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice Stay Connected! I could have never imagined this
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39998351/322386844/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk359-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDg3YzIwMi1lNDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNYz-3ncFbLjZEeSSSMtCH4S3sveJl9tnU7BWtCauCg=)

Friend – **I am so excited to be reaching out to you on behalf of my son, Marco Lopez, who's running for governor of Arizona.**
Fifty years ago, Marco's dad and I made the decision to move our family from Mexico to Arizona. We came here for the promise of greater opportunity – for the promise of Arizona. But I never could have imagined where that promise would take Marco.
**From becoming the mayor of our hometown of Nogales, Arizona, to serving in the Obama administration, Marco has always been a champion for the people of this state. And today, he's following in my footsteps – running his own small business, creating jobs and opportunity in his community. **

As a mother, I couldn't be more proud of Marco – and as an Arizonan, I couldn't be more excited for the vision he has for our great state. From defending voting rights to fixing our broken education system to increasing access to affordable health care, Marco is dedicated to making Arizona a state that works for _all_ people.
**But it won't be easy. He's running against a Trump-backed Republican – and she cares more about pushing her extremist agenda than fixing the problems of our state. Simply put, she's the exact _opposite_ of my son.**

That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Even though Marco fights day after day to make Arizona's promise a reality for everyone, he has many more fights ahead of him. And while our family has plenty of love and support to go around, he's counting on grassroots folks like you to help power this campaign to victory.

**Last time he called, he mentioned he was falling a few thousand dollars short of his next big goal, and I don't want to let him down.** **So I wanted to reach out on his behalf and humbly ask:[Friend, will you please give $5 or more today so we can elect Marco as our next governor and build a state that works for all people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39998352/322386845/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk359-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDg3YzIwMi1lNDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNYz-3ncFbLjZEeSSSMtCH4S3sveJl9tnU7BWtCauCg=)**

* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39998358/322386851/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk359-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDg3YzIwMi1lNDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNYz-3ncFbLjZEeSSSMtCH4S3sveJl9tnU7BWtCauCg=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39998359/322386852/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk359-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDg3YzIwMi1lNDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNYz-3ncFbLjZEeSSSMtCH4S3sveJl9tnU7BWtCauCg=)

name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsno12e51pd2t12ueepr6u7lnbnccjlu4s8ah6qo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpb8tj0edhnacljmcqb9ob6c5qn8crjejhr9p3j66r70otmmcrm6p1imhp32dtnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti61j30s5lmhjreob666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5g6cor0s3i6aoh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdmu57fblk9s212sla9kt7d9b93nfe60qef052a0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cphm1o74clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znfpklf4b8l3lnlq6n0hnsl0klv9bp32780bccsg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cphm1o74clh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0us2mimom86uae6tqnro2fhfebh7i0v67klolf0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cphm1o74clh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Holidays are a time for reflection
body:
Great things start with humble beginnings
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001F7CZjXebNJia55R0yPqDDgh6cC2Me_XgmdFsnyoFmjsQ9NyF5oRdaelhqW40xYYNV5GVy_JjG5hGl9Kbrn1WyxKflSHg9aVxeWwMrfJUsPcVoPB_ur8UC2afO7reVObenbgd49vTJz_XiRwo-Y0aaPsp_yayHCuR&c=TVPQ7gkoz6r8Gf_6Rrkq1O1DNQJQWpfjQW9c9O4U3H8yjzyDie15Dw==&ch=dI4eFx7s3odEkn-kWWAEnLFWt4HVmdOuckkZI9u88FYFit4JnfvGaQ==)
---
|
---
|
# Great things start with humble beginnings
---
December is an opportune time for reflection and celebration as the stillness of winter sets in and the hustle and bustle of life slows down. The celebrations of Hanukkah, Christmas, New Year's and Kwanzaa are opportunities to show gratefulness for the many blessings in our lives.
As a follower of the teachings of Jesus Christ, Christmas is deeply significant to me as my family and I celebrate Jesus's birth and the light of Truth he brought to the world along with his messages of love, kindness, hope and fulfilment.
Christmas comes on the heels of one of the longest days of the years, the winter solstice, when darkness seems to outweigh the light. As we turn the corner to longer days and more sunshine, it is fitting to celebrate the rejuvenation of light, hope and goodness in the world. It is the perfect time to look for the silver lining that is everywhere in everything.
Jesus came to restore love, kindness, virtue and truth to broken world devoid of hope. His message of peace and love is something I strive to live by and celebrate every day.
Christmas is also a reminder that great things can start with humble beginnings. So too, miracles can begin in the smallest of ways; one's decision to serve our country, to run for office or to contribute to humankind in myriad other ways--each begins with one small step. Thank you for traveling this journey with me, and I pray we all find the inspiration to fulfill our God-given purpose.
Irrespective of your faith, religious freedom is one of the foundational pillars of this country. The ability to celebrate any tradition, even to reject religion altogether, is a hallmark of this country and one I will fight to sustain indefinitely. I wish for you the greatest joy, happiness, peace and abundance as you celebrate your own traditions, even if they are nothing like my own.
Many blessings to you as we transition to a New Year with many, many good things yet to come.
---
|
---

clean_body: Great things start with humble beginnings | | | | == | | Great things start with humble beginnings December is an opportune time for reflection and celebration as the stillness of winter sets in and the hustle and bustle of life slows down. The celebrations of Hanukkah, Christmas, New Year's and Kwanzaa are opportunities to show gratefulness for the many blessings in our lives. As a follower of the teachings of Jesus Christ, Christmas is deeply significant to me as my family and I celebrate Jesus's birth and the light of Truth he brought to the world along with his messages of love, kindness, hope and fulfilment. Christmas comes on the heels of one of the longest days of the years, the winter solstice, when darkness seems to outweigh the light. As we turn the corner to longer days and more sunshine, it is fitting to celebrate the rejuvenation of light, hope and goodness in the world. It is the perfect time to look for the silver lining that is everywhere in everything. Jesus came to restore love, kindness, virtue and truth to broken world devoid of hope. His message of peace and love is something I strive to live by and celebrate every day. Christmas is also a reminder that great things can start with humble beginnings. So too, miracles can begin in the smallest of ways; one's decision to serve our country, to run for office or to contribute to humankind in myriad other ways--each begins with one small step. Thank you for traveling this journey with me, and I pray we all find the inspiration to fulfill our God-given purpose. Irrespective of your faith, religious freedom is one of the foundational pillars of this country. The ability to celebrate any tradition, even to reject religion altogether, is a hallmark of this country and one I will fight to sustain indefinitely. I wish for you the greatest joy, happiness, peace and abundance as you celebrate your own traditions, even if they are nothing like my own. Many blessings to you as we transition to a New Year with many, many good things yet to come. | | | | | == | | | | Stand with me today by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything. Donate today | == | You can help in two ways: First, write your current lawmaker opposing this outrageous legislation. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country. | | == | Together we can stand against the destructive economic policies of a heartless Biden administration. name: Humbly Sent on Behalf of Marco Rubio
subject: 98% of folks will ignore this!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Marco wrote you a note, and he really didn’t want us to reach out and bug you... &nbs; p;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?354oz--fgxr-4qqlpo8&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|

---
| | | Marco wrote you a note, and he really didn’t want us to reach out and bug you... but quite honestly, Fellow Conservative, we can’t afford to wait another minute to reach out.
**See Marco’s note below: **
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-354oz-1qmyz-4qqlpo8/ "Header")
---

Hi, Fellow Conservative. I know this is the 4th time I’ve interrupted you this week about our End of Year Deadline, but frankly, 98% of the folks I’m reaching out to won’t give. A lot of times people think they’ll give later or wait until they’re home for the evening, but then they forget. And I don’t blame them, it’s the holidays – things are busy.

Today, though, I’m begging you to help me defend America. **[All I’m asking for is $2.83, or whatever you can afford, to secure our future.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-354oz-1qmz0-4qqlpo5/ "All I’m asking for is $2.83, or whatever you can afford, to secure our future.")** I ask you, humbly: Please don't ignore this or save for later. If you are one of our rare donors, I warmly thank you.

Feel free to use the button below to access our secure and quick donation portal:

| [PLEASE HELP >>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-354oz-1qmz1-4qqlpo6/ "PLEASE HELP >>")
---

Please don’t ignore this cry for help. Our End of Year Deadline is make-or-break. We need you in this NOW!
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-354oz-1qmz2-4qqlpo7/ "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _A personal note from Marco Rubio_ :

Fellow Conservative, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress.

It is up to us to stop this, Fellow Conservative. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-354oz-1qmz3-4qqlpo8/ "please click here to donate now.")**

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio

---

| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate

Miami, FL 33266
