name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Leftists Arrested for Attacking Free Speech
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59096941:JaFeKmELN:m:1:3253819041:713F5CB951FD02C0A47A41ACEB900B9B:r) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event-with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony-a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university -**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59096941:JaFeKmELN:m:1:3253819041:713F5CB951FD02C0A47A41ACEB900B9B:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O'Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America's Foundation._ _That's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59096941:JaFeKmELN:m:1:3253819041:713F5CB951FD02C0A47A41ACEB900B9B:r) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59096941:JaFeKmELN:m:1:3253819041:713F5CB951FD02C0A47A41ACEB900B9B:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59096941:JaFeKmELN:m:1:3253819041:713F5CB951FD02C0A47A41ACEB900B9B:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59096941:JaFeKmELN:m:1:3253819041:713F5CB951FD02C0A47A41ACEB900B9B:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59096942:JaFeKmELN:m:1:3253819041:713F5CB951FD02C0A47A41ACEB900B9B:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59096943:JaFeKmELN:m:1:3253819041:713F5CB951FD02C0A47A41ACEB900B9B:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59096944:JaFeKmELN:m:1:3253819041:713F5CB951FD02C0A47A41ACEB900B9B:r)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59096945:JaFeKmELN:m:1:3253819041:713F5CB951FD02C0A47A41ACEB900B9B:r)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59096946:JaFeKmELN:m:1:3253819041:713F5CB951FD02C0A47A41ACEB900B9B:r) **

You were added to the system March 29, 2021.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/iJaFeKmELN). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJaFeKmELN)

As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro | | | | ---|---|--- 11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor Reston, VA 20191-1556 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. name: Pro Life Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3cu9rscj3tpplp3u38do1g9l9rvjmc7t2o6sjco_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cpjm0or4chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj4sb0dcgal6nrd8co08mnjj0c96b0lsnjiu87a8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cpjm0or4chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmgmu7q9o2hasgcs69t8gh0i058kradfn9fe2550_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cpjm0or4chh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

**Merry Christmas 🎄🎅🎥**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2bb7959f2abd412691408c96d92d0721&_e=LxC2BVfDcLlqkP6hjhNcTtyHTXEqbEZvK91IqEooTZBT7QZwQuOjpIfgP4ds_sWMiWrPy_HDE9An_8Jl7hHW4Ri6JDiFNEXqaECQE4UPWFpjb__N5i_F-Cdpm8NetJT1g6861-J_W1L9T7Nb_w3dIYo7j8h4na04OXE4_KqP1Sduv3PaNHaOb_g6plhPstaRFbKs-YFj_wdy7C-L0kKXwyzMfV12RTQS0kPQzQ6l-dIhH1aECCWob1_Mi7ZILgOI7RxAvsF-douk-nCPK79dBXJjAed6tlGA_fScqgHI23vBaEXxhrvMDD2MzPUzczh0kFeTG3h5IMjXxo2ZC9nC84mHXp0ZLPLIphWn1eedkXzpXlwMtEtQJeW0CBrM-sCMFoBZJOiOxuAeThRglkiWsA%3D%3D)
From my family to yours, I want to wish you a very merry Christmas.

The Christmas season means so much to me. With all the squabbling and rancor in Washington, coming home to Knoxville and spending time with family is a much needed break.

Most years, my family and I head to the theater to watch one of my favorite Christmas movies, _It’s a Wonderful Life._ Unfortunately, the annual screening was canceled due to COVID, but we will still be watching at home, and at least the dogs are happy about that.

_It’s a Wonderful Life_ doesn’t have all the special effects of today’s movies, but its message is exactly the reminder we need every year. It’s a story about one man’s ability to touch so many people and make a difference—even if he doesn’t realize it. It’s a reminder to count our blessings and remember that success comes in lots of different forms. It’s a testament to friendship, family, and sacrifice.

Here’s a little known fact. _It’s a Wonderful Life_ was actually a flop when it first came out in 1946. Due to an error, the copyright wasn’t renewed, and the movie aired on TV many times for free, causing more and more people to fall in love with it. Life sure is full of surprises. Thank you for all of your support. I wish you a blessed Christmas.
|
---
**Giving Back While Christmas Shopping 🎁**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2bb7959f2abd412691408c96d92d0721&_e=LxC2BVfDcLlqkP6hjhNcTsvRO13AXVgieZHqP6TVV-YAcFd6FZeU1Q_GcN1Iuik1qTBUcTIhUv8ReglYQHg5ko5nvGk4mymauUCLQbZny1gtKAzdzKJTTwn2Imm0uEBq7DViEry0gNMncsO6-M7AXz3KIO8_bkRLzasGt91724wyFLgIDgNefoQcwQuW1XZ23laK-b9CdgGYJez46qeqaHt1gE0k3T0twq9mhn8v9zvT5uaoWFLrsVBzqOEdLYJCfgvQQQKza0TGixghrgi4WAw33q53Xd9rq4Gsbi0vZ72WTgD_Ue5wpAY3k_PWaCNZimYQ91iaCPoUiTVQUMLSQXRQlHNOqBcDpZ55EmR0MHWuTtFuQLjxN7SZcwRi3gkYJxMAbgB0gwfCRT2qSpnwcg%3D%3D)
_Image courtesy of WBIR_
During the holiday season, Knox Area Rescue Ministries’ (KARM) stores are known all over Knoxville as a one-stop shop for all your Christmas needs. Not only do these stores save many a Christmas gift crisis, they are also [giving back](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2bb7959f2abd412691408c96d92d0721&_e=LxC2BVfDcLlqkP6hjhNcTsvRO13AXVgieZHqP6TVV-YAcFd6FZeU1Q_GcN1Iuik1qTBUcTIhUv8ReglYQHg5ko5nvGk4mymauUCLQbZny1gtKAzdzKJTTwn2Imm0uEBq7DViEry0gNMncsO6-M7AXz3KIO8_bkRLzasGt91724wyFLgIDgNefoQcwQuW1XZ2TDtt77aN0RJhKCl66vndi21HoPFxJX_HYTqSI5-BMyQqdTOgEOncsPO7sZuP8I63sqHYw9GACxCrrH0EVd_lqGAFVO9W2AsQWyCwbbtr5Yy5G4iAjGqu1C7BtBFFd_pF_IJQAYhDH01C2p4F7KGJSMy7mVuXopkhDr9iJt51K-tR58vUG7IB4_pOcD27l5uvxjkHes6dr7-zwV51owYDkQ%3D%3D) to the community in an extraordinary way.

By spending just $2 at any KARM store, you will be helping provide a meal for a homeless person in Knoxville, truly encapsulating the Christmas—and Volunteer State—spirit.

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. | | Merry Christmas 🎄🎅🎥 From my family to yours, I want to wish you a very merry Christmas. The Christmas season means so much to me. With all the squabbling and rancor in Washington, coming home to Knoxville and spending time with family is a much needed break. Most years, my family and I head to the theater to watch one of my favorite Christmas movies, It’s a Wonderful Life. Unfortunately, the annual screening was canceled due to COVID, but we will still be watching at home, and at least the dogs are happy about that. It’s a Wonderful Life doesn’t have all the special effects of today’s movies, but its message is exactly the reminder we need every year. It’s a story about one man’s ability to touch so many people and make a difference—even if he doesn’t realize it. It’s a reminder to count our blessings and remember that success comes in lots of different forms. It’s a testament to friendship, family, and sacrifice. Here’s a little known fact. It’s a Wonderful Life was actually a flop when it first came out in 1946. Due to an error, the copyright wasn’t renewed, and the movie aired on TV many times for free, causing more and more people to fall in love with it. Life sure is full of surprises. Thank you for all of your support. I wish you a blessed Christmas. | Giving Back While Christmas Shopping 🎁 Image courtesy of WBIR During the holiday season, Knox Area Rescue Ministries’ (KARM) stores are known all over Knoxville as a one-stop shop for all your Christmas needs. Not only do these stores save many a Christmas gift crisis, they are also to the community in an extraordinary way. By spending just $2 at any KARM store, you will be helping provide a meal for a homeless person in Knoxville, truly encapsulating the Christmas—and Volunteer State—spirit. | Product Of The Month 🛍 | Just For Fun—Christmas Edition 🎅 → What were the most asked for Christmas gifts this year? 🎁 () → Have trouble getting your kids to sleep on Christmas Eve? This trick might work 😴 () → Just how many cookies will Santa eat on Christmas Eve? 🍪 () | | Our campaign to take back the House in 2022 is already in the works. Please chip in today to help us oust Nancy Pelosi and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

**Happy Holidays everyone!** Whether you are celebrating Christmas, Kwanzaa, or simply enjoying time with your loved ones -- I hope your days are filled with happiness and celebration. As we exchange gifts and gratitudes during this treasured time, I am reminded of how grateful I am for our great state and all the people, cultures, and communities that make Maryland what it is. **So from my family to yours, I wish you all a very Merry Maryland Holiday Season!**

and political experts say this race will decide Senate control.

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Happy holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Hello everyone —

I hope this note finds you well. I’m reaching out today to wish you and your family much joy and love this holiday season.

Staying true to my Polish heritage, our festivities begin today! I am so grateful to share this time with loved ones and teach Hartley some of our family traditions. I feel lucky to be able to take a pause from the campaign trail and spend time reflecting on what this year has brought and everything we have to look forward to in the new one.

It’s also not lost on me that this is our second holiday season in a pandemic. Many of us will gather together for the first time in a long time thanks to so many in the medical and scientific communities who made it all possible. Far too many others have endured tremendous loss since the start of this public health crisis, and I know not everyone's dinner table will be as full this year as it once was. My heart is with you.

Over the past few years, our country has experienced unimaginable hardship filled with waves of uncertainty, trauma, and grief. We have also seen remarkable courage from those who have stepped up to support their communities — including our first responders, frontline workers, teachers, faith leaders, veterans, service members, and military families. Today and every day, I’m grateful for their service and sacrifice.

I’m also thankful for you and the support you have given me. I’m honored to work on behalf of Wisconsinites every day, and it’s thanks to all of you. So whether you've attended an event, chipped in a few dollars, followed our campaign on social media, or reached out with a word of encouragement, your support matters a great deal to me.

Whatever form these next few days take for you — whether it's ordering some take-out for yourself and a loved one, attending a small gathering of friends, getting the whole family together, or spending time with strangers over a shared table — I hope your holiday is warm and wonderful.

All my best,

Sarah
Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
Sarah for Wisconsin
PO Box 166
Madison, WI 53701
United States
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are the best way for us to stay in touch, but if you need to go, please unsubscribe here: [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ba8c6552-b164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/d2166439-ee64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjE2NjQzOS1lZTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z1lEYBP-503j72YvxRa3TJXMRfc4vJmRP-7UrYgzx0E=&id=121241219] If you only wish to receive our most important updates, submit this form for fewer emails [https://action.sarahforwisconsin.com/a/less-email]. If you'd like to support Sarah's campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin, please add a donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-donate?refcode=em2021&amount=10] to help us win.

Have a question? Reply to this email.

name: Trish Gunby
subject: Wishing my best
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999406/322393592/368400405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmIzYWMwYy1lZjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lIUk7RWf8j0aQIqbmGfO2SwMhSVGFn10C5ljHOeL3M=&emci=8920c67a-3564-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=cbb3ac0c-ef64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14943357) Peter, Every year right after Thanksgiving, residents near my home put up a Santa clock that counts down the number of days until Christmas. I always look forward to that until suddenly it says three days and then I panic. Even if you don't celebrate Christmas, it signals the end of the year and how quickly time flies by. Reflecting on this past year, my grasp of time has changed. In a race that's 322 days away and where my calendar is now being filled with countless commitments, we have a lot of work to do. Like me, members of my team are being pushed and likely pushing you too. Your support continues to astound me. Whatever the ask, you respond. We need folks to door knock, you show up. I'd love to meet your friends and colleagues and talk about this race, and you open up your homes to me. I have a year-end money goal to finish the quarter strong, and you run to ActBlue and pitch in. ([_**That's really a thing right now!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999407/322393593/1611632567?refcode=happyholidays&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmIzYWMwYy1lZjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lIUk7RWf8j0aQIqbmGfO2SwMhSVGFn10C5ljHOeL3M=)) What I've learned the last five months is that time is a commodity that cannot be squandered. It's precious and I treat it as such. In doing so, I'm mindful of the need to also _not_ schedule. To give myself a break, and to recharge. During this holiday season, be sure to do that for yourself. Self-care in life, and in politics especially, is so important. One's physical and mental health must be taken care of to make sure we can be the best versions of ourselves. Give yourself the gift of time to do meaningful and memorable things over this holiday season and into the New Year. We're one-third into our campaign marathon and we all need to have that kick at the end. After all, it's called a race for a reason! Thanks again for being my running mate, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999408/322393594/1611632567?refcode=happyholidays&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmIzYWMwYy1lZjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lIUk7RWf8j0aQIqbmGfO2SwMhSVGFn10C5ljHOeL3M=) Trish Gunby for Congress

subject: Friends, can you sign this before tomorrow?

body:

He's a Christmas baby, and we won't be gifting him jeans again. **Happy Birthday, Dr. Lorinser – See family photos, sign Doc's b-day card, and send a greetings** **_Dr. Lorinser's children, Amy, Andy, and Peter, are encouraging citizens of Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula to[sign a birthday card](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999481/322394111/1957516165?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=&emci=581cd281-eb64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=1494d8ae-f064-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) for Dr. Lorinser and [contribute in honor of his 66th birthday](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999482/322394112/-2084794817?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=)._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999483/322394113/-2084794817?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=) [CONTRIBUTE IN HONOR OF DAD'S 66th](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999484/322394114/-2084794817?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999485/322394115/-2084794817?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=) [SIGN DOC'S BIRTHDAYCARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999486/322394116/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=) Friends, Our dad is a difficult person to shop for. Dr. Bob – as you know him – is a Christmas baby. One year, when we were little, we all pitched in to buy him his first pair of jeans. He wore them once. It's dress pants or sweat pants for Dad, and usually it's sweat pants. That's the Yooper in him. This year, we thought a great way to honor our father on his special day would be to involve you, constituents and supporters. We've selected various symbolic giving amounts, e.g. **[$12.25 for his birthdate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999487/322394117/-2084794817?express_lane=true&amount=12.25&refcode=express_lane_12.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=)** and **[$66 for his age.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999488/322394118/-2084794817?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=express_lane_66&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=)** We're also encouraging everyone to **[sign his birthday card](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999489/322394119/-1882125340?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=&emci=581cd281-eb64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=1494d8ae-f064-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427)** and leave Doc a personalized birthday greeting. [SIGN THE BIRTHDAY CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999490/322394120/-1882125340?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=&emci=581cd281-eb64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=1494d8ae-f064-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) Turning 66 is a big deal for many, and it's a good time for a well-deserved retirement. Not for Dad. We thought when he returned to Northern Michigan from Iraq after serving 10 years in hazard hotspots, it would be time to retire. Just as it has his entire career, duty called, and he was again serving his community during one of the worst pandemics in 100 years. Now, at 66, he is eager to serve you as Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula's next Congressman – not to capstone his career but ready, willing, and able to shape policy that will influence and inspire the next generation of leaders. Our father taught us compassion and hard work. Growing up, we would watch him meet with sick or injured patients late at night, sometimes in our living room. He would determine the best treatment and call to get them the medical care they needed. Dad wouldn't let a phone call go unanswered, and even when off-call would rise late at night to care for other people. Compassion is paired really well with hard work. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999491/322394121/-1320607473?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=&emci=581cd281-eb64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=1494d8ae-f064-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) In everything he's done for over 40 years, he was always working for the well-being of others – very often for people who couldn't afford medical care or families who were struggling. It's why we know he'll be a great Congressman. While he was keeping his community healthy and safe, he still found time to haul us to swim, BMX, baseball, softball, hockey, figure skating, gymnastics, and more. (He's also passed down a competitive gene, which makes him a great contender for this race.) Our dad grew up in a low-income rural household with five brothers and sisters. He knows the value of a dollar, and your donations are going a long way in building a movement to get him elected. So many families in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula are like his growing up. He says he grew up blessed and lucky, and even though sometimes it was difficult financially, he was surrounded by joy and love. He ensured our lives were surrounded with joy and love as well. It's part of what motivates him to serve this district. Dr. Bob Lorinser wants to create a better future for everyone here and provide them with the opportunities he had. He believes everyone deserves to thrive, and that's a big deal. Northern Michigan and the U.P. needs a compassionate Congressman who works hard to ensure others are successful. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999492/322394122/-1320607473?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=&emci=581cd281-eb64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=1494d8ae-f064-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) We understand the holidays can be difficult for many, and giving to a politician isn't necessarily a high priority. We're also seeing how many resources are required to run a winning campaign. Dad believes in campaign finance reform and dislikes asking people for money – he even has difficulty allowing others to pick up the tab at dinner. Dad always says, "If asking people for money is the quality of a good politician, I'm no politician." He's right. The best politicians are the ones who govern and make lives better for their constituents. Too often, we're stuck with career politicians and big donors. Doc's grassroots campaign is 100% funded by the people – donors like you. Thank you. If you can afford it this holiday season, we encourage you to honor our dad's 66th birthday with a donation so he and his team can win in 2022. Happy birthday, Dad. Happy holidays, everyone. We hope you have a merry Christmas and a happy new year. Amy, Andy and Peter [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999493/322394123/-1320607473?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=&emci=581cd281-eb64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=1494d8ae-f064-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) _**The Dr. Bob Lorinser for Congress campaign is 100% funded by individual donors. With a deadline in 6 days Dr. Bob is up against corporate PACS and dark money. We need you. Can you pitch in and make a contribution today?**_ [CONTRIBUTE IN HONOR OF DOC'S 66TH](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999494/322394124/-2084794817?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999495/322394125/-2084794817?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=) [SIGN DOC'S BIRTHDAY CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39999496/322394126/-1882125340?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=&emci=581cd281-eb64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=1494d8ae-f064-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15167427) You may [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/581cd281-eb64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/1494d8ae-f064-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk0ZDhhZS1mMDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h_mPi-YLmww4XjkyKb57-xA7xeaLEhoQbLvyrZR-_MU=&id=116937387). PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. BOB

name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: [WATCH] Fetterman family holiday JibJab e-card
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Don’t judge our dance moves.
#
From our family to yinz and youse, wishing you all very, very happy holidays! ❤️🎄
We’re feeling so incredibly grateful for each and every person who’s shown us support this year that we really can’t even put it into words. So... we danced it out. In other words, the kids had a *little* too much fun making a holiday JibJab e-card. (Well, except Grace, who said it was “like, corny.” 🙄)
**[Click here to watch the Fetterman family JibJab e-card in all its glory — and while you’re there, we’d appreciate anything you can chip in to help our campaign keep going strong, since fundraising will take a dip this holiday weekend. Even $5 means a lot!](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38893?refcode=em20211224-3946&t=1&akid=3946%2E434096%2E-ESdAb)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38893?refcode=em20211224-3946&t=2&akid=3946%2E434096%2E-ESdAb)
Derek, we sincerely hope this festive surprise makes you giggle as much as we did. 😂
But dancing elves aside, we really do want to take a second to express our huge care + appreciation for all of you. And that goes double for anybody who might be having a tough time this season, because of Covid or really any reason at all.
You each mean so so SO much to us, and you’re the reason we get up and fight for a better future each and every day.
So, thank you, from the very bottom of our hearts!! ❤️
Lots of love from your favorite dancing elves,
John + Gisele (+ Karl + Grace + August + Levi)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211224-3946-footer&t=3&refcode2=3946_434096_-ESdAb&akid=3946%2E434096%2E-ESdAb)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=4&akid=3946%2E434096%2E-ESdAb)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=3946%2E434096%2E-ESdAb)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawn=20Hyland?=
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8b1b54fc8b93/merry-christmas?e=5167ed8367)
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
# Merry Christmas and Happy New Year!
_And the angel said to them, “Fear not, for behold, I bring you good news of great joy that will be for all the people. For unto you is born this day in the city of David a Savior, who is Christ the Lord.”_ _\- Luke 2:10,11_|
---
This year, we are celebrating Christmas and cherishing the opportunity to gather as a family during the holiday season. I hope you and your family have a very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year! This is a moment for celebration, connecting with loved ones, and reflecting on the past year.We have been blessed by God so much this past year and as I look back, I thank Him for providing for my family faithfully through every step. I am also proud that America has remained committed to its principles, allowing all to freely celebrate their faith, heritage, and traditions.So as we are looking forward to 2022, I want to pause and extend my warmest to you and your family. I pray that this season treats you well.Merry Christmas,Shawn Hyland
|

name: Paul Begala
subject: re: Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ][IMG]

Hello,

I’ve been in politics for a long time, and I know what it takes to win a
tough election. I've spent my career helping elect Democratic governors,
senators, and even presidents.

So take it from me: I’ve never seen anyone like Tim Ryan. He’s got what it
takes to flip Ohio’s open Senate seat blue.

But here’s another thing I know: Republicans will stop at nothing to keep
Ohio red. They’re already spending nearly $10 million on the airwaves and
attacking Tim every chance they get. We can’t let them go unchallenged.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6365?t=1007&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ]The Senate majority hinges on Ohio. If we’re going to win this critical
race, we need to raise $25,000 a day to fight off the GOP’s attacks. Will
you donate $25 or more to help Tim and his team pull off a win? There’s
never been a more important time to give.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6366?t=1014&amount=25&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6366?t=1015&amount=50&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6366?t=1016&amount=100&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6366?t=1017&amount=200&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6366?t=1018&amount=250&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6366?t=1019&amount=25&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ]Other Amount

Look, we all know what’s at stake. From finally passing voting rights
legislation to protecting abortion access to raising the minimum wage.
NONE of that happens if we lose here in Ohio and Mitch McConnell takes
back the Senate.

Even from the minority, McConnell and his henchmen are blocking bills left
and right by abusing the filibuster. It’s clear protecting our slim 50-50
majority is not enough. We must expand it. And Tim Ryan is our best shot.

The Wall Street Journal calls Tim 2022’s most important candidate and CNN
ranks this seat as one of the most likely to flip. But all of that falls
apart if we don’t have the resources to overcome whatever the GOP will
throw Tim’s way.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6365?t=1008&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ]Please, donate $25 or more to help Tim reach his end-of-year FEC goal,
win this historic election, and expand the Democratic majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6366?t=1020&amount=25&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6366?t=1021&amount=50&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6366?t=1010&amount=100&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6366?t=1011&amount=200&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6366?t=1012&amount=250&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6366?t=1013&amount=25&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ]Other Amount

Let’s give ‘em hell.

—Paul

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=1838%2E3611125%2EpoMbaK ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!

name: Doyle Canning
subject: Holiday Pics, Plus an Open Race for Congress in '22
body:
There is now an open primary in Oregon's fourth district for the first time since 1986. Our district has also been redrawn to lean stronger Democratic, making this a "safe" district for any Democrat. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDKIWPcJl1fRqgCa2JPTEKaIB-gW2divyXMsvnN-l96-tDpZutcKIsCMnH4dAp0OI3e9aYa2BGDjJQc4HojGKA20jkzNoeco1HS59zd6VgQMGN2LKBaNLcq3_sprK8R7S-HqG6I2T_wCrbP9HOL-z49Js14xpVNkDAgxduWjX-hQLZzQGyIgobRbSkrrfD_DJB63sxqGp9fe3eg2L2fdunsTSvkGGcZ3DdDOU4Ij3ecMMrShyrlcQL8NTr6zCZAGdco6EPMbJSjgRD1MvOnZGCHoLOU85GY51eMjcYMJahSN1ipmhgIxn5yxuBLE5qtwTRg/3i4/whBw_9SgR9uygK2cecBn9g/h0/q6E51v2tLNhXZJL6B3KmCWpI66HOJ2ntuOjUoXHwyaI)
---
Hi Freinds,
---
Season's greetings to you and your family. We are busy getting ready for Santa's arrival and sending you warm wishes for a safe and joyous holiday and Happy New Year! 2021 has been a journey with a [surprise ending](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG00-9hpt1WQ9MsbnZ4AWtB14j5bQuhIKWnXcQw393PX3cD4veFYdq9_L1kCfUTRMQ-l2Y0JYfc4XBnG3YoLYnC4K_yV4-AMTIYHNMmR5DrhN7WTVsRpR-3XCH0AwlZchFLQgxbQ3Bq8h74pWCaHsheD0y-R5ExH_qr_ZwuhqFt_Jd-4pZX021SA0jUZBFD8NMStAdnVBNE5j5_u9tpFAfgoBOh8gQ7lSX3S8dtzANrGWbDBHoO-pFB7TdMoTNhhu81qadjCf2MrGX1-HBNqv_v2waFoZ2hn2L3wGksdk6d8WhKQii_AqQOTZkjdMyC_aqrAxqE23ll1CZdRQnb_oQ1XWMartaEx1tthGuDtKsZ6W_VQaPNMadbB_SNX45KuC1xQ/3i4/whBw_9SgR9uygK2cecBn9g/h1/3ew418NWkap8P5jwRhYzTqMpQpZBCDYVemCB5JMKgYQ): Congressman Defazio announced that he will not seek re-election in 2022. This news has us considering a change of plans and another run for Congress.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
There is now an **open primary** in Oregon's fourth district for the first time since 1986. Our district has also been redrawn to lean stronger Democratic, making this a **"safe" district** for any Democrat. Every day I get messages saying, "please run." People have stopped me on the street to ask me if I would. I have heard from many supporters who are ready to back another Canning candidacy and have made pledges of support, but**I have not yet decided.** We will be taking time over the holidays to consider and I need to hear from you. Here is what I told the [Eugene Weekly: ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG00-9hpt1WQ9MsbnZ4AWtB14j5bQuhIKWnXcQw393PX3cD4veFYdq9_L1kCfUTRMQ-l2Y0JYfc4XBnG3YoLYnC4K_yV4-AMTIYHNMmR5DrhN7dygcwlwQDTer5t7HAwjJKDwV8XLuQCpDG6gT5RJ9O8eJn8uDJAiWv8pEF6rTo6b6-U8rz-B6JxmRVCk9SE23SoOlQ0jw6awVUgUY8Wa-smPNZEDULNtTw1R-8vO9vgQCV7_2qAF-jYmAkOUUx179Qz2ACEA33Gq7anAFsjsfE5ChwEdo9B0JV44cVm1VQi_BHDDPi2nMZ7SJSbyy79j56KIhOFV4mpCdz6cIJbWBYDM9m5nKde-0WJCa29PeRGRlom7TyRrT7XXmG40_lodDRw/3i4/whBw_9SgR9uygK2cecBn9g/h2/garqzmK2-uBJFfwqrPfd3CuIHmQQhCT4uNp1MC6JJ-Q)
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG00-9hpt1WQ9MsbnZ4AWtB14j5bQuhIKWnXcQw393PX3cD4veFYdq9_L1kCfUTRMQ-l2Y0JYfc4XBnG3YoLYnC4K_yV4-AMTIYHNMmR5DrhN7M3YrddwJEa8nGQKr_X6FN0gjT7mEYC5i2sRAaw-WY1GIGUiXYfAKz40SE1O7l0AEKWHYa_Iva38tX_7nmMA3A-BfGVLSJlNR3RLSlMwyUOeYbBGPIbsBoyYusXnXzKo3zkLVx8c3BDDz-8C-4-g5Vjo7sl2RboP3qslHlNYHl6wC6Iks5w1p1gfO-oYApSZ4Rp2JfS6xQV-s-4nohwUcOLaVKXD2fOzn33-FqZVDRuprf6B6cOA84-DkHInEszWY22Yxn7owulDdNtamf6YzGQ/3i4/whBw_9SgR9uygK2cecBn9g/h3/kUZLgNl9dpOzDHJu81i4F_8Y58FQbNYM1oUe0qTwupg)
---
**Please reach out to me by email, phone,** or text and let me know what you think, and if you are ready to support us if we decide to run.** I want to hear from you: 541-357-1206 ** **Wishing you joy and peace,**
---
|
---
|
---
| | Sent via [ActionNetwork.org](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/O93kI8o-kT9cRvZ9zJLPP23W7H9qpHR7DTBpQ546uYYF0UnRKJ3Fnz-ArCAOD8DlcrjXdfjjxJtrebvQ8HhlTBXyVYGjFaP1AnvMtdvTzG1RuvLDwre1AyFgNC7NecJSv5Vofv3B8Lc65ra_OM4CiGiRE6dxW-3blk-Qdvar5h3HKceRpCj2SWAMzC6-I_Q8XLA3nVPYvUP6Fcju6nciBlDyRztLEPaGe6lm2jDik0TlBA6qCvVFWF0nvtnJvAu7YUIBftz0PlysheM6VyJjfRg-JXSzr7QC0BpUfEiRIAfh1FLys37OtcUg7Cb9fYkn/3i4/whBw_9SgR9uygK2cecBn9g/h4/FCY7tGDW93j0Xaf-325IdSeJy2o8MRcB7Gf8hBBgUSY). Will you rush in just $3 — or whatever you can afford — to help me catch up and win our Special Election this spring? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40000005/322400258/441797979?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20211224_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTIyNGY0My1mODY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ua-9qXkRbgekTS5D1STNDUbX7tZMYJ0As7N4sj71Ox8=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40000012/322400265/441797979?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=PAFC_20211224_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTIyNGY0My1mODY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ua-9qXkRbgekTS5D1STNDUbX7tZMYJ0As7N4sj71Ox8=)

[Or a custom donation »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40000014/322400267/441797979?amount=10&amounts=3,7,10&refcode=PAFC_20211224_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTIyNGY0My1mODY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ua-9qXkRbgekTS5D1STNDUbX7tZMYJ0As7N4sj71Ox8=)
I’m running a campaign to replace Devin Nunes and give my community the voice it deserves in Congress.

## May You Have a Merry Christmas!
As we continue in this season of celebration, look around! Stand up and walk outside! Take a deep breath of fresh air! Go spend time with your family and friends! Celebrate! Go to the store and buy something if you want! Eat some more cookies! Sing a Christmas song as loud as you like! Rejoice! And remember that the freedom you have came from Jesus Christ! At the same time, a woke mob of 200,000 liberal activists have a massive petition going to block Trump’s site & ban him for life.

**We can’t let them get away with this:** [**Will you step up, stand with Trump, and stop Biden and the woke mob before it’s too late?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-355v3-1qnkv-4qqlpo8/)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Merry Christmas
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=merry_christmas_2021&n=1)
---
December 24th, 2021
## Merry Christmas
I know every political organization and candidate sends the typical 'Merry Christmas Email' at this time of year. Everyone does it - so the message isn't very unique. That's why I generally skip the typical holiday emails. But as we close out the year, I can't **thank you** enough for **your support and confidence** in our team to lead the battle on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers and Stopping Vaccine Mandates. Your support is making my team and my family's Christmas extra special this year. Because of your help, this Christmas season we are not living under the dictates of Governor Walz' Emergency Powers that banned families from getting together. Equally as important, churches are no longer shut down by the order of one man. We can celebrate the birth of Christ together. As Walz sits in the Governor's Mansion this Christmas, coughing from [his bout of COVID](https://www.action4liberty.com/mask_wearing_fully_vaccinated_governor_walz_tested_positive_for_covid?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=merry_christmas_2021&n=2), our team is preparing for a monumental 2022 where we aim to make sure COVID authoritarianism **Never Happens Again**!
## MERRY CHRISTMAS!
**Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=merry_christmas_2021&n=3 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=merry_christmas_2021&n=3)
---

You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=merry_christmas_2021&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=merry_christmas_2021&n=6), software for leaders.

name: Team Kaptur
subject: Making spirits bright
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress
body:
The best gift for our favorite Congresswoman? Spoilers inside. |
Marcy Kaptur | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux4ZdoZGS3PKLkv8O1RsIqstlibUyiXLNZZqSs8JAORlNbWxcwduf7WcjyH19A996sALJlhTnMkL0fAujw8vBLfwEcAxTqTMvnSsU06i4Y4FBHuXc50dK2SZoP1JCS4IYOtZZF_E7kDTuZakMEZpVxF2irJ720vebUw9CHlRxEjUi6E4p0wvYA_J5cmtUm8MeDMjt3HfN7ZD88M6iX2YL5jmza6xX52RBvXLXrQaKdCnAsqFpXb1uXGptYrLv_jhtcRh1SsPzHu79L3UT0_H9fzvTEczZroO4Ql2z3GkFED-CSu2SROU31DrNXHJgd1tNUL9_HGrUSbfaX9IpCIFMHIbliSCdfegM81fWJb4Ll35_lZJirisQ5EWh8BBF4nIKbw/3i4/iN85wrL7RYa5SDctd54AjA/h0/ZJzPPjVmQ1VBjLVIKzaeRTio16-OkKrQyrg2ESbQA1w)

| | Team,

We’ve been racking our brains trying to come up with the perfect holiday gift for Marcy. Today, it dawned on us (_we’re last-minute shoppers_).

What do you get a Congresswoman who’s been fighting for our progress for generations? That’s right, a list of her most ardent supporters, her core team that has her back.

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: wishing you a Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
[](sarahforgovernor.com) | |
---
Peter,

I wanted to send a quick note today wishing you a Merry Christmas!

I absolutely love this time of the year - spending time with family, giving gifts, and celebrating our Lord and Savior.
[](sarahforgovernor.com)
It’s a beautiful season and I feel very blessed to have so many people in my life to celebrate God’s greatest gift to all of us.

I hope it’s a joyous time for you and your family, too.

Thank you for all your support this year. I look forward to everything we can accomplish together in 2022.

Merry Christmas from our family to you and yours!

Sarah Huckabee Sanders

subject: Merry Christmas, from our family to yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
As we look back on 2021 and look forward to the New Year, we want to thank you
for your support and friendship.

Peter,

As we look back on 2021 and look forward to the New Year, we want to thank you
for your support and friendship.

Notwithstanding all of the challenges we've faced over the last two years,
Northeast Wisconsin remains the best place to live, work, and raise a family
because of patriots like you who love our community, our state, and our
country.

We are all blessed to be citizens of the greatest country on earth, and we
must work to keep it that way for our children and grandchildren.

We wish you and your loved ones a very merry Christmas and a happy New Year
filled with joy and peace.

God Bless America.

Merry Christmas,

Mike, Anne, and Grace

Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin.

P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

body:

name: Friends of Charity Barry
subject: Merry Christmas and Happy New Year
body:
| | | | |
---
| |
---
Peter, since starting this journey, people like you have renewed my faith in this country. Your support and contributions have helped invigorate this campaign and prepare us for the work we need to do in the coming year. That being said, there's a long road ahead and we are all in this together! Though we continue to face political turmoil, even during this miraculous season, I want to recognize the importance of spending time with family and friends while celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ. As it is written in Isaiah 9:6, For unto us a child is born, unto us a son is given: and the government shall be upon his shoulder: and his name shall be called Wonderful, Counsellor, The mighty God, The everlasting Father, The Prince of Peace. God bless you and thank you for your continued support! Merry Christmas! Check out my Christmas [Video](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010qMH6EhKt63mX9sFG0hrBOIwCtwbUuuaniOnlrLswiWcm2rk4RP0GW4Wk7XEGttVbBNfHjclqM0b_j4IF5CdUGJXL4UKZXj0EpYEOv6gLfd35SgcOz6-r7tfdepOpdWWISlWQINP0LjiuB4zfiX8Hg==&c=1U0iZrFuB0KDS96P8IYaBhDh2z4M9fSUWpDs8jDKJj08HM0AIf_lpg==&ch=tydPmB0MGCIW6u_POKf9ARQeGuJP3zh341X0gooLM4cgC31PeGy7ig==)
Charity Barry

clean_body: | | | | | | | Peter, since starting this journey, people like you have renewed my faith in this country. Your support and contributions have helped invigorate this campaign and prepare us for the work we need to do in the coming year. That being said, there's a long road ahead and we are all in this together! Though we continue to face political turmoil, even during this miraculous season, I want to recognize the importance of spending time with family and friends while celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ. As it is written in Isaiah 9:6, For unto us a child is born, unto us a son is given: and the government shall be upon his shoulder: and his name shall be called Wonderful, Counsellor, The mighty God, The everlasting Father, The Prince of Peace. God bless you and thank you for your continued support! Merry Christmas! Check out my Christmas == Charity Barry | | == | | | | | | | Friends of Charity Barry | 437 S. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
From my family to yours. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39997616/322383302/1561815853?refcode=ea.9568691a-df64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.9568691a-df64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTY4NjkxYS1kZjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MAnv5OBAswNKFddRHWdlMiqRCu_mKvIYc_mw0zMuSJg=&emci=756dd24d-9562-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9568691a-df64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12666102)
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39997617/322383303/1561815853?refcode=ea.9568691a-df64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.9568691a-df64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTY4NjkxYS1kZjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MAnv5OBAswNKFddRHWdlMiqRCu_mKvIYc_mw0zMuSJg=&emci=756dd24d-9562-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=9568691a-df64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12666102) Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays, Peter!

As 2021 comes to a close, I’m thinking about how much we’ve accomplished over the past year.

I decided to run for Congress because I knew our district and our communities deserved a leader who prioritized science, workers, our children, and the climate.

I never imagined how much this campaign would grow. We’ve received donations and support from people all across the country, and I’ve gotten so much encouragement from this incredible team.

It’s been an extremely challenging two years for countless reasons. I hope you are able to find some time for rest and reprieve this holiday season.

I’m so grateful for your support and I can’t wait to start 2022 off strong.

With gratitude,

clean_body: From my family to yours. | | Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays, Peter! As 2021 comes to a close, I’m thinking about how much we’ve accomplished over the past year. I decided to run for Congress because I knew our district and our communities deserved a leader who prioritized science, workers, our children, and the climate. I never imagined how much this campaign would grow. We’ve received donations and support from people all across the country, and I’ve gotten so much encouragement from this incredible team. It’s been an extremely challenging two years for countless reasons. I hope you are able to find some time for rest and reprieve this holiday season. I’m so grateful for your support and I can’t wait to start 2022 off strong. With gratitude, Dr. Yadira Caraveo | | **= | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you would like to receive fewer emails, please .** ****If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.******

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Wishing you a safe and happy holiday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
I hope you and your family are doing well and that you’ve been able to
find a safe way to spend time together over the holidays. Amy’s sister is
in from out of town and we spent most of yesterday with her young family.

The boys, Amy’s nephews, were baptized in the morning (by the same priest
who married us and who just celebrated his 70th (!) wedding anniversary)
and afterwards we came back to our house for a big family lunch to
celebrate. Tonight we’re hoping to see my uncle and aunt who are also in
town. It’s good to be with everyone again after the last two years of
being apart.

When not with family I’ve spent the last couple of days on the phone
calling people to ask them to contribute to our campaign before the end of
the year or to thank them for organizing events for us. We want to end the
year strong, so these calls are really important. I’m happy to tell you
that the support out there has been really encouraging — people are
genuinely happy to help and are giving what they can.

Our campaign team has also been working hard, focused this week on making
sure that our message is getting out to voters everywhere in Texas. And
not just to those who receive this email or to those who show up to our
events. These headlines are a great example:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50681?refcode=ema20211224-168097&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=168097%2E444211%2E3OMddb ]Front page op-ed authored by Beto [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50681?refcode=ema20211224-168097&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=168097%2E444211%2E3OMddb ]Front page article with image of Beto
titled Invest in Rural Areas like speaking at event titled Beto Calls For
Marshall to Help Them Thrive Unity over Big Issues In Visit to Midland

While most Texans live in the big cities and urban counties — and while
you will see me spending a lot of time in Houston, Dallas, Fort Worth, San
Antonio, Austin, and El Paso — smaller towns and rural communities are
also important to this state’s future. These are the places that produce
the fiber, food, and fuel that drives the success of our state. They are
typically overrepresented in enlistments for our armed forces. In short:
Texas wouldn’t have a prayer if it weren’t for these rural communities.

But because these places have voted reliably Republican over the last
twenty years, you’ve seen many state and national Democrats write them
off. And because those Democrats stopped showing up, Republicans didn’t
have to either. There was no competition for votes, no accountability for
office holders and very little progress made on the issues most important
to this part of the state.

For example, because Governor Abbott has refused to expand Medicaid, more
rural hospitals have closed in Texas than in any other state over the past
decade. People are driving hours in some cases to see a doctor or deliver
a baby. Greg Abbott has also vetoed critical funding for rural phone and
internet service, meaning that bills in this part of the state could go up
by more than $100 per month for many customers. And rural towns are not
seeing the investment in roads, water systems, and broadband that will
allow them to be competitive with other parts of the state and country.

As one person I met in Jones County put it to me: “How do I ask my kids to
move back to Stamford if they can’t get online, if we can’t attract better
jobs and if they don’t see us investing in the future of our town?”

I am showing up in these communities — places like Stamford, Abernathy,
Rising Star, Paris, and Marshall, to name a few from this last trip —
because the people who live in them are important to me, important to the
future of Texas, and because as Governor I want to deliver for them. I am
listening to people, and reflecting back their priorities and solutions in
the campaign that we’re running.

This is the right way to run a campaign if we want to win — by doing
better in every part of the state. And I believe this is the only way to
run if I'm going to come through for everyone in Texas as the next
governor of this state.

Thank you for supporting a campaign that refuses to take anyone for
granted or write anyone off. Happy holidays to you!

I look forward to seeing you in the new year.

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50681?refcode=ema20211224-168097&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=168097%2E444211%2E3OMddb ]Donate

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=168097%2E444211%2E3OMddb

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeff?=
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
The Hope Of Christmas | | | |
---
|
# **Newsletter-December Vol. 1, #4**
---
| | | 24December21

Dear Friends, **Merry Christmas!** 10 But the angel said to them, “Do not be afraid;
for behold, I bring you good news of great joy which will be for all the people;
11 for today in the city of David there has been born for you a Savior,
who is Christ the Lord.
Luke 2:10-11, NASB At Christmas, people all over the world pause to remember the birth of our Savior, Jesus Christ. Christmas celebrations have occurred throughout history despite difficulties faced at the time. Our presidents have reminded Americans of how Jesus' birth continues to impact the world.

For example, in the midst of World War II, President Franklin Roosevelt [reminded](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=7cd84d1045&e=12a37459a2) the nation of the reasons Jesus' message has endured:
It is because the spirit of unselfish service personified by the life and the teachings of Christ makes appeal to the inner conscience and hope of every man and every woman in every part of the earth. It transcends in the ultimate all lines of race, of habitat, of nation. It lives in the midst of war, of slavery, of conquest. It survives prohibitions and decrees and force. It is an unquenchable Spring of Promise to humanity.

President Harry Truman acknowledged the reason for Christmas when he [told Americans](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=9f879a2181&e=12a37459a2) on Christmas Eve of 1952:
[W]e remember another night long ago. Then a Child was born in a stable. A star hovered over, drawing wise men from afar. Shepherds, in a field, heard angels singing: "Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace, good will toward men." That was the first Christmas and it was God's great gift to us. This is a wonderful story. Year after year it brings peace and tranquility to troubled hearts in a troubled world. And tonight the earth seems hushed, as we turn to the old, old story of how "God so loved the world, that He gave His only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth in Him should not perish, but have everlasting life."

President Ronald Reagan shared Truman's sentiment when he [said](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=bf11fc976e&e=12a37459a2):
An angel of the Lord appeared to them [shepherds] and said: "Fear not: for, behold, I bring you good tidings of great joy, which shall be to all people. For unto you is born this day in the city of David a Savior, which is Christ the Lord." Suddenly there was with the angel a multitude of voices praising the Heavenly Father and singing: "Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace, good will toward men." Sometimes, in the hustle and bustle of holiday preparations we forget that the true meaning of Christmas was given to us by the angelic host that holy night long ago. Christmas is the commemoration of the birth of the Prince of Peace, Jesus Christ, whose message would truly be one of good tidings and great joy, peace and good will.

As we gather with family and exchange gifts, take time to read the Christmas story (Luke 2:1-20) and remember the True reason for this Christmas season. From all of us to all of you, Merry Christmas!
(Reprinted from WallBuilders.com) Please share this newsletter with others.

Standing with you,

Jeff
---

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zjd2qd8mhhuou03nhjtfjgn69g1fi8mqavt1n44g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cpgeao36c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zh1tc4kgl5bghoa3928d49un2vpj8mvtgvteraa0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cpgeao36c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zvl4aslpiiigk7sgmfdb88abrmulg3jkc7ppnpj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0cpgeao36c5h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the persons or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. name: Laurel Imer
subject: 🎄 Merry Christmas 🎄
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress
body:
Merry Christmas! My message to you this Christmas is...
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AeUXEAzdlmQCi-5qqHdrYO67C2RP3r21I6zR3h0zkrzo99TQw0R3qWDOyywjQh_YoJCyEnMiskkOL0ydRgBUynhkWxAFS0jl_4cm9nhEj_Rkfb4AD89ncoX1T2HMbLMXuSDhSG4PLpA4667ktEZYTLRQU7pHSMU9&c=gMMICIJsTvrRrpnEP50tPLzY5yEWeW-KAEyJd_5reVO5lpgPsj-3yg==&ch=x86_JnrHhp6U2zzuSexwoAy1oighlsz-u40HC6li0WPaKDyDg9-WXA==)
---
| Friend, From my family to yours, I want to wish you a very Merry Christmas!
This past year, we all have been met with challenges, heartaches, and some very difficult issues. However, this Christmas we get to spend time with our families, friends, and loved ones celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ.
In this time of reflection, hope, and joy, I pray that you find peace and tranquility for the coming year. We have a lot of work to do, and a long road ahead, but we can't let that discourage us because we have God on our side and with him, we can do anything!
Last Christmas, my family and I weren't able to be together as we were all extremely ill with COVID-19. This year, we are back together as a family, celebrating Christmas and I could not be more thankful. Last year reminded me just how important Christmas really is. Christmas is about family, our love for one another, and a reminder of the greatest gift of all, God's unending love for us.
So I want to encourage you, go be with your families, call that friend or family member that you haven't spoken to in years, salvage those relationships and learn to forgive and embrace the love and joy of the holiday season.
Next year will be a very busy and challenging year for us all. Come next Christmas we will see that all the blood, sweat, and tears were worth it all.
Once again, from my family to yours I want to wish you all a very Merry Christmas and a Happy and safe New Year!
"Thanks be to God for his indescribable gift!" 2 Corinthians 9:15
Gratefully,
---

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Grateful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hey Peter, as we get closer and closer to the new year – and officially enter the next election year – I can't help but think about everything that's happened since we launched this campaign to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) back in July.
I traveled across every corner of Iowa the weekend I launched this campaign. I heard from people everywhere about how ready they are for change, how Sen. Grassley has sold out working families for too long, and how he's sided with wealthy special interests and emboldened the lies of the former president.
We've built a campaign that can do right by working families like mine, and _win._ Our movement is made up of tens of thousands of grassroots donors – and if you've been waiting for the right time to pitch in your first donation to defeat Sen. Grassley, it's right here and right now. Here's the best link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40001623/322412140/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk489-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzU4Y2U0Yy0xNjY1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82ULk-OZ98qHhbKcGC9VzLyVtx4XfaVBUEHk5cG7sZE=)
We've built a campaign that's helped make Sen. Grassley more vulnerable than he's been in _decades._ Just recently, The Des Moines Register revealed polling that shows Sen. Grassley at record-low approval.
The momentum is on _our _side, Peter, and nobody will work harder than I will to ensure that we win this race and expand our Democratic Senate majority. Together, I know we can do it – which is why I'm so grateful to have you on this team. If you can chip in a grassroots contribution today of whatever you can spare, I'd sure appreciate it. Here's that link again: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/abby-finkenauer-email**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40001624/322412141/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk489-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzU4Y2U0Yy0xNjY1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82ULk-OZ98qHhbKcGC9VzLyVtx4XfaVBUEHk5cG7sZE=)
–Abby

body:
Celebrating with love and gratitude | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mcshanellc/mask-mandates-5355865?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=3e241189e5&e=102b599530)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Tonight is one of the holiest nights of the year. As we celebrate the birth of our Lord Jesus Christ, who was sent down from heaven as a tender child in a manger to save all men and women from sin, we must never forget how such a simple act of love can change the world.

I am so grateful for the love and support I’ve received throughout my life, especially when I had taken up the campaign trail to stand up for our values and our faith in this nation.

I want to thank you for following me on this great journey, as we have much to look forward to in the coming year of 2022.

Through all the challenges and hardships we face, we must always remember that we can overcome anything with the love of Christ.
Wishing you and your family a very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year!
---
| **_Jay Block_**
Candidate for Governor
Lt Col (Ret), USAF

[](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=92a68f9e72&e=102b599530)

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Happy holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
From our family to yours, Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!
#

From our family to yours, Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!
We’re grateful to be spending time with family, sharing stories and laughter, eating great food, and giving thanks.
My grandmother, Mimi, always made the holidays special. Her pound cake is one of our family’s favorite recipes, and we’d like to share it with you!
As we celebrate the holiday season, let us spread good will towards all people.
Wishing you peace and joy this holiday season,
— Cheri, Curt, Matthew, Thomas, and Stanley (woof!)

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=179%2E357359%2EiuOqF2). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=179%2E357359%2EiuOqF2). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=179_357359_iuOqF2&akid=179%2E357359%2EiuOqF2) today to help us make history.

subject: Happy Holidays from Team Smilowitz!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ben Smilowitz for Congress
body:
Before we ring in 2022... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9b4b8cd4adb0/happy-holidays-and-new-year-from-team-smilowitz-13816383?e=0faa9de128)
---
| | [ ](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=e0d0c6e556&e=0faa9de128)

| |
### Dear Peter,

Happy Holidays!

We hope this last week of the year is peaceful and restorative for you and your loved ones.

December 31 also marks the end of our campaign's first quarter. **Our entire campaign will be judged by the amount we report as raised on our campaign's first-ever FEC end-of-quarter filing and we've set a goal of raising an additional $7,500 before we ring in 2022!**

[**This is the *first* filing deadline of our campaign and we can't reach this new end-of-year goal without you. Can you pitch in $25 or whatever you can to help us get there?**](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=fca1dffb6f&e=0faa9de128)**[](https://bensmilowitz.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bfd6913686637edfb10b27a3&id=690d585cb0&e=0faa9de128)**

We've had great success engaging voters across MD-6 over the last few months. We'll be kicking the campaign into a higher gear in January and we can only do that with your renewed support.

**Thank you** and we look forward to collaborating with you in the year ahead!

Ben & Team Smilowitz
