disclaimer_text: Paid for and Provided by
body:
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=24650f775cb24703930e0653fc6c949d&_e=xtkS-mPrEcI7cA3Rn_K2ScTeTj3HHdaMwfBBXf0AuUupCEjzzeRRh8lhB5eQppxZS0BbxdkgvgNumtcp8sP4FWhEECNyZdKzebinC26saeiYAEZXXuan-H5jFKC0o5kWQJ19hK4GlnYDHu51uGhloZqXa_2LQPV-kG205z-HRC0Ri9XHVbKSt3DeeRuc3Bu86IKj2B5dRIlR2148zCaEE09MC97KYDeGivjiqxiFY90Ytt3bWyLIdaXTEEAKuK_XF2QWHkeqk2ZvcWmo5vaChA%3D%3D) My friend, Christmas is a special time for my family, as we take a moment to relax and count our blessings. I have so many blessings in my life, far too many to count, and my heart is full as we move into this next year and all the amazing opportunities that it holds. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=24650f775cb24703930e0653fc6c949d&_e=xtkS-mPrEcI7cA3Rn_K2ScTeTj3HHdaMwfBBXf0AuUupCEjzzeRRh8lhB5eQppxZKrrXFOkIqBmD9ryedDkhI-Z6nB29dniuPI1ZpVm6RVseERLSmZzOsW3iHxBBlY049XEr-wgqHyG832mrF8zFMjpgOG5Wk2ZY_ol0HEH0oXTvuyyRvkDH1UMsSMgLZVCGEIEeo2Hycg1C9uN2KAKA8F_6CnZAts7M3js_1DYRP8qY7JO8bQxQ7jghEg-MXhjHxNr0NwiWMF_3ZuukYA9XQg%3D%3D) Thank you for joining us on this journey; your support is the best gift I could ever hope to receive. I hope you enjoy the time spent with your family and loved ones. May you create many new, beautiful memories to cherish for years to come! Team, it is the Biden’s first holiday season in the White House as President and First Lady — and we want to make sure it is one to remember!

_We know this card will go VIRAL!_ So if you want to reserve your spot, we need you to sign in the next HOUR, team! [ADD YOUR NAME TO SIGN THEIR HOLIDAY CARD NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4631?t=7&akid=1050%2E878179%2EDW_xfu) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4631?t=8&akid=1050%2E878179%2EDW_xfu) | [ADD MY NAME »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4631?t=9&akid=1050%2E878179%2EDW_xfu)

Team, President Biden and his family have done SO much since they moved into the White House last January.

So we want to make sure they know how much we appreciate them — _and we know your signature will mean the world to them!_

But this card is filling up fast, so we need you to sign IMMEDIATELY!

[Don’t miss your chance, our card will close tomorrow at MIDNIGHT! ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4631?t=10&akid=1050%2E878179%2EDW_xfu)

_VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1050%2E878179%2EDW_xfu). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1050%2E878179%2EDW_xfu).**

name: Marc For Oregon
subject: ⭐ Merry Christmas to You and Yours! ⭐
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE
body:
| | | | You are the light of the world — like a city on a hilltop that cannot be hidden.
---
---
## Wishing you and your loved ones a warm and peaceful Christmas & New Year!
---
As the good book says, "you are the light of the world—like a city on a hilltop that cannot be hidden." Let us rise together to light a blaze of brightness for Oregon fueled by truth, hope, and love this Holiday Season!
---
We are truly grateful for your continued support through sharing of your gifts of talent, time and treasure to stay connected and support our mission to shed light across areas of darkness in Oregon, that we may restore and renew hope and our beautiful state to one of goodness, prosperity and safety for all.
---
I am very much looking forward to continuing our campaign efforts through tangible action and truth revealing as we grow weekly in our incredible momentum forward! Remember, you found this campaign for a reason—we need your prayers of prosperity and protection as we take on the evils in our state!
---
---
---
|
---
In addition to much appreciated prayer, you can support our campaign in the following ways:

clean_body: | | | | You are the light of the world — like a city on a hilltop that cannot be hidden. Wishing you and your loved ones a warm and peaceful Christmas & New Year! As the good book says, "you are the light of the world—like a city on a hilltop that cannot be hidden." Let us rise together to light a blaze of brightness for Oregon fueled by truth, hope, and love this Holiday Season! We are truly grateful for your continued support through sharing of your gifts of talent, time and treasure to stay connected and support our mission to shed light across areas of darkness in Oregon, that we may restore and renew hope and our beautiful state to one of goodness, prosperity and safety for all. I am very much looking forward to continuing our campaign efforts through tangible action and truth revealing as we grow weekly in our incredible momentum forward! Remember, you found this campaign for a reason—we need your prayers of prosperity and protection as we take on the evils in our state! | In addition to much appreciated prayer, you can support our campaign in the following ways: | | | Thank you very much and MERRY CHRISTMAS to you and your family! | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 949, Bandon, 97411

subject: Merry Christmas from Sen. Mia McLeod

body:
| | | Merry Christmas everyone! I love this time of year. It’s a time to slow down and reconnect with our loved ones. As I reflect on the past year I have so much to be thankful for. I’m grateful for you and every person who has supported this campaign. We’re taking some time to slow down, but before I go I wanted to say, Merry Christmas!! Have a safe and happy New Year. | | [Watch Mia's Message](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/oZT1C-8NKsWHlAiWATd-7GsfzETRW0sSVYozBa0h7gy6kMDU4488WDvdWg5zuCHvCBNvWDkuqLzLTHRdlEWIxv2x2JyNRRO5Uaug0LYUlH2esAWiAPQkzYWDDP2fHTsjY6H_ub2CepLNjO1fysn4-tP5z6JVh_ZKHhhXsS0U6Z0JaMuQH3Jdfg25K5RwMboq-FA-vem8Zm-GmtnUtZ7xEPd4alN50BfxAikV_G7a1sxqHxu7zTvp-1aWJoEu7aijZLD2pmX2e2LPGTvkBWXI_Q/3i4/wKCTdBQTRnqubNOoBNIYZA/h0/s-tn5rlhzh6K2QnpetwRfcRxe8Lh6Ba_Sccc--eE5aQ)

body:
We wouldn’t be here without all of your support. Happy holidays, from us to you. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jessicaforwis/happy-holidays-from-us-to-you-je9d8l0wrl?e=42a933bda9)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Hello friend,

As we reach the end of 2021, we all find ourselves gathering with our loved ones, spending time reflecting on the previous year, and setting goals for the year ahead. We wouldn’t be here without all the support we have received from all of you as we set big goals for the year to come. From all of us with Jessica Katzenmeyer for Wisconsin, we hope you have a wonderful end to 2021, a happy holiday season, and nothing but happiness in the year to come!

We know that many want to give to charities during this time of the year as needs grow during the holidays. Please, if you are able, consider a donation to any of the following charities this holiday season.

---
| [Feeding America: Eastern Wisconsin](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=b12fc030e1&e=42a933bda9 "Feeding America: Eastern Wisconsin")
---
| [American Red Cross Wisconsin](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=e149fe8376&e=42a933bda9 "American Red Cross Wisconsin")
---
| [Jefferson County Christmas Neighbors](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=4f0f54a54d&e=42a933bda9 "Jefferson County Christmas Neighbors")
---
|
Thank you so much, and have a happy holidays.

Sincerely,
Team Katzenmeyer

---

**To many of us, Christmas is about the divine miracle that shows God is above all in this world.** It’s about celebrating the real reason for this holiday season along with the very Judeo-Christian values that founded these United States.

These values are the reason I got involved in politics. Christmas represents all of those values and shows us why we need to stand up for our beliefs. **I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate, and I’m running because even though we see Christmas as a miracle for everyone, many others see America as a miracle in this world.**

I believe that we cannot allow our miracle to be extinguished because of radical liberals like Ilhan Omar and Nancy Pelosi who only want to see us grow weaker by the day. body:

Twas the night before Christmas, when all through Team Ryan headquarters
Staffers were worrying, they needed the help of their supporters.
For just around the corner, the end of the year loomed
If they didn’t raise enough money, they’d be doomed!

Only six days away, was the end-of-year FEC deadline,
Their report would show if fundraising was on the decline.
So before this tale goes any longer,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6313?t=1007&akid=1775%2E3611125%2ENTxupN ]Will you chip in to make their FEC report stronger?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6314?t=1011&amount=25&akid=1775%2E3611125%2ENTxupN ]Donate

Tim Ryan’s campaign still has quite a ways
Before they reach what they need to raise.
They can’t count on the support of right-wing mega-donors, oh no!
Hardworking people give what they can to help this campaign grow.
So dear friend, with urgency abound,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6313?t=1008&akid=1775%2E3611125%2ENTxupN ]Can you chip in $25 to keep Tim’s campaign around?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6314?t=1012&amount=25&akid=1775%2E3611125%2ENTxupN ]Donate

Tim’s opponents are Grinches and Scrooges with no holiday cheer
They’re out to stop Tim in his tracks before the New Year.
They look down on Ohio’s hardworking folks,
Call them entitled, and believe the 2020 election was a hoax.

JD Vance has a $10 million super PAC boosting him thanks to Peter Thiel,
But Tim is the only candidate who will cut workers in on the deal.
Josh Mandel is an extremist Trump-lackey, who’s raking in cash
So the Ryan team needs your help to compete—it’s a mad dash!

The GOP is funneling funds and has even more on hand,
Only YOU can help stop them and make the Senate majority expand!
Whatever you can spare would go a long way,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6313?t=1009&akid=1775%2E3611125%2ENTxupN ]So please rush a donation, what do you say?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6314?t=1013&amount=25&akid=1775%2E3611125%2ENTxupN ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6314?t=1014&amount=50&akid=1775%2E3611125%2ENTxupN ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6314?t=1015&amount=100&akid=1775%2E3611125%2ENTxupN ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6314?t=1016&amount=200&akid=1775%2E3611125%2ENTxupN ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6314?t=1017&amount=250&akid=1775%2E3611125%2ENTxupN ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6314?t=1018&amount=25&akid=1775%2E3611125%2ENTxupN ]Other Amount

And with that final ask, there’s no more to write,
Happy holidays to all, and to all a good night!

—Team Ryan
